contract_references: CONTRATO ELECTRONICO DE OBRA N° 352 DEL 2024
claude.evidence_summary: The document is a "Cuenta de Cobro N° 001" (invoice/billing account) dated 12 November 2024, issued by Asociación Wayuu Araurayu (NIT 825.001.057-7) to the Alcaldía del Municipio de Uribia (NIT 892.115.155-4). It requests a 50% advance payment of COP $169,910,380 under electronic works contract N° 352 of 2024. The document bears a physical receipt stamp from the Alcaldía Municipal de Uribia – Secretaría de Hacienda, dated 13 November 2024 at 3:26 PM, with radicado code 20241113-1, confirming receipt by the buyer. Signed by legal representative Custodio Valbuena G. (C.C. 79.048.770).
red_flags: Document is an advance payment request (anticipo 50%), not a payment for services already rendered or goods delivered — no delivery/execution proof attached
Invoice total in PDF is $169,910,380 (rounded) vs SECOP row value of $169,910,380.5 — minor rounding discrepancy
No formal invoice number in standard format; uses 'Cuenta de Cobro N° 001' which is an informal billing note, not a fiscal invoice (factura)
No supervision acceptance (acta de recibo a satisfacción) or delivery certificate present in this document
Advance payment (anticipo) carries inherent risk without performance bond or guarantee documentation visible
claude.reason: The Cuenta de Cobro N° 001 is a valid billing document for a 50% advance (anticipo) of COP $169,910,380 under Contract N° 352/2024, and it has been physically received and stamped by the Secretaría de Hacienda of Uribia on 2024-11-13. Supplier NIT and buyer NIT match the contract context. However, since this is an advance payment — not a payment for completed/delivered work — there is no delivery or supervision acceptance evidence. AP should verify that a performance guarantee (póliza de anticipo) and supervisor authorization are on file before approving disbursement.

contract_references: CONTRATO ELECTRONICO DE OBRA N° 352 DEL 2024
claude.evidence_summary: Cuenta de Cobro N° 001 emitida el 12 de noviembre de 2024 por la Asociación Wayuu Araurayu (NIT 825.001.057-7) a la Alcaldía de Uribia (NIT 892.115.155-4), solicitando el anticipo del 50% del contrato de obra N° 352 del 2024 por valor de $169.910.380 COP. El documento fue recibido y sellado por la Secretaría de Hacienda de la Alcaldía Municipal de Uribia el 13 de noviembre de 2024 a las 3:26 p.m. (Radicado: 20241113-1), lo que confirma recepción formal. El monto corresponde exactamente al 50% del valor total del contrato ($339.820.761 / 2 = $169.910.380,50), consistente con el contexto contractual. Firmado por el Representante Legal Custodio Valbuena G., C.C. 79.048.770.
red_flags: No hay acta de inicio ni soporte de cumplimiento de requisitos previos al desembolso del anticipo (e.g., pólizas, garantías)
El documento es una cuenta de cobro (no factura electrónica), lo que puede requerir verificación de habilitación fiscal del proveedor
No se adjunta acta de inicio del contrato que justifique la procedencia del anticipo
La entrega/recepción confirmada es solo de la cuenta de cobro por la Secretaría de Hacienda, no de bienes o servicios ejecutados — el anticipo es prepago, no pago por servicio recibido
claude.reason: La Cuenta de Cobro N° 001 por $169.910.380 COP corresponde al anticipo del 50% del Contrato Electrónico de Obra N° 352 del 2024, y fue recibida formalmente por la Secretaría de Hacienda de Uribia el 13-Nov-2024. El monto es consistente con el 50% del valor contractual total ($339.820.761). Sin embargo, se recomienda solicitar soporte adicional antes de aprobar el pago: (1) acta de inicio del contrato, (2) aprobación de pólizas/garantías exigidas como requisito previo al anticipo, y (3) verificación de que el proveedor cumple con obligaciones tributarias (RUT, facturación electrónica o habilitación para cuenta de cobro). Una vez verificados estos requisitos previos, el pago puede proceder.

claude.evidence_summary: The Secretaría de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira certifies receipt ("recibió a satisfacción") of the 7th progress report from Asociación Wayuu Araurayu for August 2021, under contract CO1.PCCNTR.2276440-2021. The document confirms compliance with the contract object and authorises the 7th payment of $206,746,538.39 COP. Signed by Rosmira Peralta Medina (Secretary of Education) and countersigned by supervision and coverage area staff on 9 November 2021.
red_flags: Contract referenced in PDF (CO1.PCCNTR.2276440-2021) does not match the known contract context (CO1.PCCNTR.2247055) – possible mismatch or sub-contract
Supplier name in PDF ('Asociación de jefes familiares wayuu de la zona norte de la Alta Guajira – Wayuu Araurayu') differs slightly from known context supplier name
Buyer in PDF is Secretaría de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira, not Ministerio de Educación Nacional (MEN) as stated in known context
No formal invoice number present – this is a certification/supervision support document, not an invoice
Payment amount ($206,746,538.39) cannot be independently verified against an attached invoice; it is stated in the certification letter only
claude.reason: This document is a supervision/payment certification ("Certificación para Pago") issued by the Secretaría de Educación de La Guajira confirming satisfactory receipt of the 7th progress report for August 2021 and authorising payment of $206,746,538.39 COP. While it constitutes valid delivery evidence ("recibido a satisfacción"), it references contract CO1.PCCNTR.2276440-2021, which does not match the known contract CO1.PCCNTR.2247055 provided in context. The buyer entity and supplier name also differ slightly from the known context. Additional supporting documentation (formal invoice, matching contract reference, and reconciliation between the two contract IDs) should be requested before approving payment.

claude.supplier_name: ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA
claude.buyer_name: GOBERNACIÓN DE LA GUAJIRA
claude.service_period: Últimos seis (6) meses anteriores al 16 de enero de 2023
claude.evidence_summary: The PDF contains two certifications of compliance with social security, pension, occupational risk, and parafiscal payment obligations, both signed by Revisora Fiscal Yamairi Estarita Lopez (T.P. 113952-T) on behalf of Asociación de Jefes Familiares Wayuu de la Zona Norte de la Alta Guajira (NIT 825001057-7). Page 1 is dated 16 January 2023 and covers the six months prior to that date. Page 2 is dated 18 October 2022 and additionally notes that administrative staff contracted for 2022 are enrolled in the social security system. Neither certificate contains invoice amounts, delivery confirmations, or quantities billed. These are purely regulatory compliance support documents.
red_flags: No invoice number present — document is not an invoice
No invoice total or payable amount stated anywhere in the document
No delivery proof, recibido a satisfacción, or acta de entrega — delivered_or_received cannot be confirmed
Two certificates with different dates (16-Jan-2023 and 18-Oct-2022) bundled in one file — coverage periods may not align with the specific payment being processed
SECOP category is listed as invoice_payment but the document is a parafiscal compliance certificate, not a payment document
Buyer (Gobernación de La Guajira) is not explicitly named in the certificates — only the supplier entity and its NIT appear
claude.reason: This document is a regulatory compliance certificate (Certificación de Cumplimiento de Pago al Sistema de Seguridad Social en Salud, Pensiones, Riesgos Profesionales y Parafiscales) and not an invoice or delivery receipt. It provides necessary but insufficient support for an AP payment: it confirms the supplier was current on social security and parafiscal obligations during the covered periods, which is a legal prerequisite for payment in Colombia (Art. 50 Ley 789/2002). However, no invoice total, delivery confirmation, or service acceptance is present. The AP team should request the corresponding invoice, supervisor acceptance (acta de recibo a satisfacción), and payment order before approving disbursement.

extractions.excerpt: The PDF contains two certifications of compliance with social security, pension, occupational risk, and parafiscal payment obligations, both signed by Revisora Fiscal Yamairi Estarita Lopez (T.P. 113952-T) on behalf of Asociación de Jefes Familiares Wayuu de la Zona Norte de la Alta Guajira (NIT 825001057-7). Page 1 is dated 16 January 2023 and covers the six months prior to that date. Page 2 is dated 18 October 2022 and additionally notes that administrative staff contracted for 2022 are enrolled in the social security system. Neither certificate contains invoice amounts, delivery confirmations, or quantities billed. These are purely regulatory compliance support documents.

model.evidence_summary: The document is an electronic sales invoice (FEWA-131) issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA to DEPARTAMENTO DE LA GUAJIRA SECRETARÍA DE EDUCACIÓN for educational services. The invoice details a payment for March 2023, corresponding to 20% of contract No. 010 of 2023. The service involves administering a partial basket in ethno-educational centers in Manaure and Hatonuevo, La Guajira, to guarantee the right to own education. The invoice total is $405,753,457.27. The document also includes a 'Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago' and an 'INFORME DE SUPERVISION' related to the contract, indicating that the services were received and supervised.
model.reason: The invoice is complete and matches the contract details. The service period and description are clear. The payment is for a completed service as indicated by the supervision report and certificate of compliance.

The document reports compliance with 23 general obligations and 13 specific obligations under the contract for administering the educational service basket (canasta parcial) at Internado Dumingueka and Internado Kogui in Dibulla, La Guajira. No invoice total, delivery acceptance, or recibido a satisfacción is present in this document.

claude.evidence_summary: Este documento es el Segundo Informe de Ejecución del Contrato N°012 de 2022, presentado por la Asociación de Jefes Familiares Wayuu de la Zona Norte de la Alta Guajira Wayuu Araurayu (NIT 825001057-7) a la Secretaría de Educación Departamental de La Guajira. El informe detalla el cumplimiento de 23 obligaciones generales y 7 obligaciones específicas al cierre del mes de marzo de 2022. Se reporta: contratación de personal docente y administrativo, afiliación a seguridad social y parafiscales, suscripción del acta de inicio (vigencia 8 feb 2022 – 7 dic 2022), constitución de pólizas (N°11-44101184140 y N°11-40-101046213 con Aseguradora Seguros del Estado S.A.), proceso de adquisición de material pedagógico, y atención a 1.209 estudiantes. No se adjunta factura, acta de recibo a satisfacción, ni acta de entrega formal. El documento no contiene totales de factura ni valores de cuentas por pagar.
red_flags: No se adjunta factura ni número de factura
No hay acta de recibo a satisfacción ni acta de entrega firmada por el supervisor
No se evidencia aprobación formal del supervisor sobre el informe
El documento no contiene totales de cuentas por pagar ni valor de cobro
El material pedagógico aún está en proceso de adquisición al momento del informe (obligación 6 no completada)
Se menciona demora en contratación del servicio de transporte escolar como anomalía reportada
No hay firma visible del supervisor de contrato en el documento
claude.reason: El documento es un informe técnico de ejecución contractual (segundo informe mensual, cierre marzo 2022) que acredita avance en obligaciones generales y específicas del Contrato N°012 de 2022. Sin embargo, no constituye soporte suficiente para aprobar un pago: no existe factura adjunta, no hay acta de recibo a satisfacción firmada por el supervisor, no hay valor de cobro, y algunas obligaciones específicas (material pedagógico, transporte escolar) no estaban completamente ejecutadas al momento del informe. Se recomienda solicitar: (1) factura o cuenta de cobro del período, (2) acta de supervisión/recibo a satisfacción firmada, y (3) evidencia de cumplimiento de obligaciones pendientes antes de aprobar cualquier pago.

claude.evidence_summary: Electronic invoice FEWA-93 issued 2022-06-02 by Asociación de Jefes Familiares Wayuu de la Zona Norte de la Alta Guajira (NIT 825001057-7) to Departamento de La Guajira Secretaría de Educación (NIT 892115015-1) for the third payment corresponding to April 2022 under Contrato No 011 de 2022. Invoice total COP 107,381,161.89 with no IVA and no discount. Payment method: bank debit transfer scheduled 16/06/2022. The invoice footer states "una vez aceptada declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción," constituting acceptance of receipt. CUFE hash present, digitally signed via e-Factura/Cadena platform. SECOP contract context references CO1.PCCNTR.3538343 with matching supplier and object.
red_flags: Invoice number on PDF is FEWA-93 but SECOP row records it as 'FEWA 9' – possible truncation or data-entry discrepancy; verify.
Buyer on invoice is 'Departamento de La Guajira Secretaría de Educación' while SECOP contract buyer is listed as 'Gobernación de La Guajira' – same entity but name mismatch should be confirmed.
Supplier name on invoice ('ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA') differs slightly from SECOP contract ('ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') – likely typo but should be verified against NIT 825001057-7.
No independent delivery/supervision acceptance document (acta de recibo a satisfacción, informe de supervisión) is attached; receipt evidence relies solely on the invoice footer boilerplate clause.
SECOP row indicates invoice has NOT been paid (paid: no), yet the invoice states a payment date of 16/06/2022 – status inconsistency requires reconciliation.
claude.reason: The electronic invoice is well-formed, digitally signed, and the amount (COP 107,381,161.89) matches the SECOP payable figure. However, approval should be withheld pending: (1) clarification of the invoice number discrepancy (FEWA-93 vs. FEWA 9), (2) confirmation that the buyer entity name aligns with the contracting authority, (3) submission of a formal supervision/acceptance report (informe de supervisión o acta de recibo a satisfacción) as independent delivery proof beyond the invoice boilerplate, and (4) reconciliation of the SECOP "paid: no" status against the invoice's stated payment date of 16/06/2022.

claude.evidence_summary: This is Supervision Report No. 03 (Month of April) for Contract 011 of 2022, issued by the Secretaría de Educación de La Guajira. The document records a 37.8% physical execution advance as of April 2022. The financial balance sheet (page 2) confirms a SEGUNDO PAGO (second payment) of $107,381,161.89 corresponding to invoice FEWA-93 for the month of April, with a net value of $107,381,161.89 (0% advance amortization). claude.evidence_summary: This is the Third Execution Report (Tercer Informe de Ejecución) for Contract N°011 de 2022, submitted by Asociación Wayuu Araurayu to the Secretaría de Educación Departamental de La Guajira. The document reports compliance with 23 general obligations and 12 specific obligations as of the close of April 2022. It describes activities performed including: hiring of administrative staff and their affiliation to social security, acquisition of school kits and school insurance, SIMAT characterization of 3,534 students, withdrawal of 10 students from Uliyunakat in April, planning of 4 pedagogical workshops, and maintenance of confidentiality and documentation. The report is a narrative supervision/compliance document; it does NOT contain an invoice total, a payment order, or an explicit delivery/receipt acceptance (recibido a satisfacción or acta de entrega). The invoice number FEWA 9 and total of 107,381,161.89 COP are known from the SECOP row context but are NOT stated in this PDF. No financial totals appear in the document itself.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a two-page "Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago" (payment order / compliance certificate) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Secretaría de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira. Page 1 shows the full financial balance of Contract 014/2023 (initial value $848,948,310; additions $420,006,006; total $1,268,954,316; 96% execution) and lists 8 prior invoices (FEWA-129 through FEWA-186) totalling $1,119,758,983 already disbursed. The current payment document is invoice FEWA-213, dated 29 December 2023, for the final payment corresponding to November 2023 service, with a payable amount of $102,577,293 (zero IVA, zero amortisation). Page 2 confirms receipt/entry into the warehouse system under entry number GJR2023ER014514 on 20 December 2023, and bears the supervisor's signature dated 29 December 2023. Supervisor: ADAULFO ADOLFO MANJARRES MEJIA, CC 17.957.744, Secretario de Educación Departamental, Gobernación de La Guajira. The document certifies that the supplier fulfilled the service specifications to satisfaction and meets all legal requirements for payment authorisation.

claude.evidence_summary: The Secretario de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira (Supervisor ADAULFO ADOLFO MANJARRES MEJIA) certifies receipt ("recibió a satisfacción") of the Final Supervision Report from ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU for November 2023 (period 1–21 November 2023) under Contract No. 014. Signed and reviewed by the supervisor, PAE financiero, P.U. de Permanencia, and Líder de Cobertura on 29 December 2023.

claude.evidence_summary: El documento es un Informe Mensual de Actividades correspondiente al mes de Noviembre 2023, emitido por la Asociación Wayuu Araurayu bajo el Contrato 014 de 2023. Incluye: (1) tabla consolidada de complementos programados vs. realmente entregados por mes (Febrero–Noviembre 2023), mostrando 29.133 complementos AM entregados en Noviembre de 32.994 programados para 2.538 titulares en 13 días; (2) Informe de Obligaciones Contractuales con avance del 100% en ítems de alistamiento (1.1, 1.3, 1.4, 1.5, 1.6) y operación (2.1, 2.2, 2.3, 2.4, 2.5, 2.6), documentando acciones de limpieza/desinfección, capacitación continua en Noviembre, y cumplimiento de obligaciones de personal. El documento acredita la prestación del servicio en el período reportado y constituye soporte de supervisión/cumplimiento para el pago de la factura FEWA 213.
red_flags: El PDF no contiene el valor total de la factura ni un acta de recibo a satisfacción firmada por el supervisor; el monto pagadero (102.577.293 COP) proviene únicamente del contexto SECOP externo, no del documento adjunto.
3.861 complementos AM programados no fueron entregados en Noviembre 2023 (diferencia entre programado 32.994 y entregado 29.133), lo que puede implicar descuento proporcional en el pago.
En Febrero 2023 se registran 0 complementos realmente entregados de 43.146 programados; acumulado de no entregados es significativo a lo largo del contrato.
El ítem 1.2 (certificado sanitario de bodega de almacenamiento) reporta N/A porque la asociación no cuenta con bodega de almacenamiento de alimentos, lo cual es una obligación contractual incumplida.
No se adjunta acta de supervisión firmada ni documento de 'recibido a satisfacción' explícito para el mes de Noviembre 2023.
El número de factura FEWA 213 y el total de 102.577.293 COP no aparecen en el cuerpo del PDF; provienen del contexto externo SECOP.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a two-page "Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago" (payment processing certificate) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Secretaría de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira. It covers the second payment for April 2023 services under Contract 014 de 2023. Page 1 shows: contract value $848,948,310 (order-of-acceptance value), total disbursed to date $124,953,248, total caused/unpaid $142,663,878, total executed $267,617,126, execution rate 31.5%. The current payment order references invoice/document equivalent FEWA-132 dated 08 May 2023 for $142,663,878. A prior invoice FEWA-129 (March, dated 21 May 2023) for $124,953,248 is also listed. Page 2 shows the supervisor/interventor certification signed on 01 June 2023 by ADAULFO ADOLFO MANJARRES MEJIA (CC 17.957.744, Secretario de Educación Departamental, Gobernación de La Guajira), confirming the supplier fulfilled the service specifications satisfactorily. Warehouse entry number GJR2023ER005534 dated 17 May 2023 is recorded, confirming receipt/radicación.
red_flags: Contract value on this document ($848,948,310) differs from the known SECOP contract value ($1,268,954,316) – this may reflect an Orden de Aceptación sub-value rather than the full contract, but should be verified.
Supplier NIT on document (825.001.057 DV 7) matches known supplier; however the document name includes 'ARAURAYU' as a suffix not present in the known supplier name – minor discrepancy to confirm.
Invoice FEWA-129 listed as prior payment (Marzo, $124,953,248) but its date shown is 21 Mayo 2023, which is after the April service period – sequencing should be reviewed.
No explicit unit-level ration/meal quantities (number of students, rations, days) are stated in this payment certificate; only aggregate monetary amounts are shown.

Valor Causado No Pagado ($142,663,878) equals the current payment amount, consistent; however the document does not attach the underlying invoice FEWA-132 itself – only the payment certificate references it.

claude.evidence_summary: Informe Parcial de Supervisión No. 2 emitido por la Gobernación de La Guajira - Secretaría de Educación Departamental para el Programa de Alimentación Escolar (PAE) vigencia 2023, correspondiente al mes de abril. El informe certifica un avance físico del 31.5% de ejecución contractual. Se acredita entrega del servicio en los C.E. Caracas Ruleyas, C.E. La Cruz e I.E. Guamachito mediante certificados de cobertura atendida firmados por los directores de los establecimientos educativos y por el Representante Legal de la Asociación Wayuu Araurayu. Se verificó cumplimiento de pagos al SISS (salud, pensión, riesgos laborales) con planillas de abril. El balance financiero muestra: valor inicial $848.948.310, valor pagado acumulado $124.953.248 (MARZO), valor causado no pagado $142.663.878 (correspondiente a la factura FEWA 132 de abril), valor total ejecutado $267.617.126, valor por ejecutar $581.331.184. El contrato inició el 9 de marzo de 2023 con duración de 180 días calendario escolar y fecha de terminación 11 de julio de 2023. No se estipuló anticipo. No se generaron rendimientos financieros.
red_flags: El número de factura FEWA 132 proviene del contexto SECOP externo; no aparece explícitamente en el cuerpo del PDF del informe de supervisión.
El invoice_total de $142.663.878 se extrae de la casilla 'Valor causado que no se ha pagado' del balance financiero, no de una factura física adjunta en este PDF.

El balance financiero muestra valor inicial del contrato como $848.948.310, mientras el contexto SECOP indica valor contractual de $1.268.954.316 — posible diferencia por adiciones o por tratarse de un tramo/lote parcial.
La casilla 'Entrega producto' para la obligación 4 (pagos SISS) aparece marcada 'Sí ___ No ___' sin marca visible, lo que podría indicar omisión en la verificación de ese ítem.
No se adjunta acta de recibo a satisfacción formal ni remisión de factura dentro de este PDF; la aceptación se infiere de los certificados de cobertura y del informe de supervisión.

Single lump-sum line item (1 WSD) with no breakdown of ration counts, beneficiary numbers, or school-level detail — quantity verification not possible from this document alone.

However, no delivery/receipt evidence (acta de entrega, recibido a satisfacción, or supervisor sign-off) is included in this PDF. AP rules require visible proof of receipt before approval. Additionally, the buyer entity name differs slightly between the invoice and SECOP context, and the single lump-sum line item lacks ration/beneficiary-level detail. Supporting documents (supervision certificate, delivery record) should be requested before approving payment.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a "Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago" (payment processing certificate) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Secretaría de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira. It covers the first payment for March 2023 services under Contract 014 de 2023 for the School Feeding Programme (PAE) at three etnoeducativo centres. The document records: invoice FEWA-129 dated 21 May 2023 for COP 124,953,248; warehouse entry number GIR2023ER005876 dated 29 May 2023; documentary management entry GIR2023ER005876 dated 29 May 2023; and supervisor/interventor certification signed on approximately 2 June 2023 by ADAULFO ADOLFO MANJARRES MEJIA (CC 17,957,744), Secretario de Educación Departamental, Gobernación de La Guajira, certifying that the supplier fulfilled the service to satisfaction. The contract total is COP 848,948,310 (as shown on this document; the SECOP context states COP 1,268,954,316 — likely a different lot/order of acceptance). Execution at time of payment: 14.7% (COP 124,953,248 caused and executed out of COP 848,948,310). IVA is zero. No advance (anticipo) was recorded.
red_flags: Contract value on document (COP 848,948,310) does not match SECOP context value (COP 1,268,954,316) — possible different order of acceptance or lot; verify scope.
Invoice date field on document reads 21 MAYO 2023 but SECOP metadata states 2023-04-21; date discrepancy requires clarification.
Supplier NIT on document (825.001.057 DV 7) matches known supplier but full legal name on document includes 'ARAURAYU' suffix not present in SECOP supplier name — confirm same entity.
No explicit unit quantities (rations/days/students) are itemised in the invoice; only a lump-sum payment is stated.
Supervisor signature date (approx. 2 June 2023) is after warehouse entry date (29 May 2023) — minor sequencing note, not a blocker.
claude.reason: The document is a duly completed Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago with: (1) a valid invoice number FEWA-129 and payable amount of COP 124,953,248; (2) warehouse/documentary receipt entry GIR2023ER005876 dated 29 May 2023; (3) supervisor certification signed by the Secretario de Educación Departamental confirming satisfactory service delivery; and (4) budget reference (RP 222, rubro 22-2-322281021-213) confirming appropriation. The main red flag is the contract value discrepancy between the document and SECOP metadata, which should be reconciled, but does not block payment of this specific invoice. The invoice total of COP 124,953,248 is clearly stated and supported by supervision acceptance.

contract_references: Registro Presupuestal 222 de 22 DE FEBRERO de 2023
claude.evidence_summary: Informe Parcial de Supervisión No. 1 del Programa de Alimentación Escolar (PAE) Vigencia 2023, correspondiente al mes de marzo 2023. El documento acredita: (1) ejecución física al 14.7% del contrato; (2) entrega de certificados de cobertura atendida firmados por directores de los C.E. Caracas Ruleyas, Guamachito y La Cruz; (3) planillas de registro y control de asistencia; (4) actas de entrega de elementos de aseo, dotación y carpetas PAE; (5) pago de seguridad social del personal dinamizador (planillas SISS verificadas); (6) constitución de pólizas de garantía vigentes; (7) participación en comité dinamizador PAE. El valor causado no pagado registrado en el balance financiero es $124,953,248. El contrato no estipuló anticipo (No X). No se registran pagos realizados al contratista a la fecha del informe.
red_flags: Supplier name in PDF ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES DE LA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP registered name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA GUAJIRA') - verify legal name match before payment

Invoice total of $124,953,248 is sourced from SECOP row context, not explicitly stated as an invoice/factura total within the PDF body itself - PDF shows it as 'Valor causado no pagado' in the financial balance table
Obligation No. 4 (SISS payments): 'Entrega producto Si ___ No ___' is left blank/unsigned in the PDF - delivery confirmation for social security payments not formally checked

No acta de recibo a satisfacción or formal payment order (orden de pago) is present in this document - supervision report alone may be insufficient for AP approval without accompanying invoice/factura
Comité dinamizador actas missing for C.E. Caracas Ruleya and La Cruz (only Guamachito confirmed per obligation 8 description)

claude.evidence_summary: El documento es un Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago (CCTP) emitido por la Dirección Financiera de la Secretaría de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira. Corresponde al pago final del mes de Noviembre 2022 bajo el Contrato No. 29 de 2022. La factura equivalente es FEWA-122, expedida el 1 de diciembre de 2022, por valor de $97.488.768. El documento registra entrada al almacén (GJR2022ER15456) con fecha 16 de diciembre de 2022 y radicación documental en la misma fecha. El supervisor ADAULFO ADOLFO MANJARRES MEJIA (CC 17.957.744), Secretario de Educación Departamental de la Gobernación de La Guajira, firmó el 19 de diciembre de 2022 certificando que el proveedor cumplió a satisfacción. El historial de facturas muestra 8 pagos previos (FEWA-91 a FEWA-112) por un total girado de $1.176.620.264. El valor total del contrato con adiciones es $1.366.614.264 y la ejecución es del 93,2%.
red_flags: Discrepancia en el nombre del proveedor: el contexto SECOP indica 'ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA' mientras el PDF indica 'WAYUU ARAURAYU' como sufijo adicional; posiblemente la misma entidad con nombre extendido.

El monto de la factura en el PDF ($97.488.768) no coincide exactamente con el valor registrado en SECOP como invoice_total (9.748.876); diferencia de un orden de magnitud — posible error de captura en SECOP o truncamiento de dígitos.
El número de factura en SECOP es '009' pero en el PDF la factura equivalente es 'FEWA-122'; no coinciden — puede ser numeración interna vs. numeración SECOP.
El contrato referenciado en el PDF es 'Contrato No. 29 DE 2022' (número interno de la entidad territorial), mientras el ID SECOP es CO1.PCCNTR.3534069; se recomienda verificar correspondencia.

El valor total girado acumulado ($1.176.620.264) supera el valor inicial del contrato ($1.122.963.840), aunque hay adiciones por $243.650.424 que elevan el total a $1.366.614.264 — consistente con el balance financiero presentado.

model.evidence_summary: The document is a monthly activity report for November 2022 detailing the activities performed by UNIÒN TEMPORAL WALAPUIN PAE 2022 for the School Feeding Program (PAE) in La Guajira. It includes sections on contract details, object of the contract, representative, start date, duration, and contract value. The report also details the number of beneficiaries, programmed and delivered complements (lunch, AM, interned), and consolidated non-delivered complements for each month from February to November 2022. Furthermore, it outlines contractual obligations for the 'alojamiento' and 'operación' phases, detailing actions taken, verification sources, and percentage of advance for each item. Specific actions include adapting facilities, health exams, training, route planning, menu publication, signage, delivery of technical specifications, and ensuring adequate human resources. The report indicates 100% development for most listed obligations.
model.reason: The document is a monthly supervision and activity report for the PAE program, detailing the execution of contractual obligations. It shows progress and completion of various tasks related to the contract. While it's not an invoice, it serves as proof of service delivery and supervision acceptance for the period.

claude.evidence_summary: The document is a monthly activity report for November 2022 detailing the activities performed by UNIÒN TEMPORAL WALAPUIN PAE 2022 for the School Feeding Program (PAE) in La Guajira. It includes sections on contract details, object of the contract, representative, start date, duration, and contract value. The report also details the number of beneficiaries, programmed and delivered complements (lunch, AM, interned), and consolidated non-delivered complements for each month from February to November 2022. Furthermore, it outlines contractual obligations for the 'alojamiento' and 'operación' phases, detailing actions taken, verification sources, and percentage of advance for each item. Specific actions include adapting facilities, health exams, training, route planning, menu publication, signage, delivery of technical specifications, and ensuring adequate human resources. The report indicates 100% development for most listed obligations.
claude.reason: The document is a monthly supervision and activity report for the PAE program, detailing the execution of contractual obligations. It shows progress and completion of various tasks related to the contract. While it's not an invoice, it serves as proof of service delivery and supervision acceptance for the period.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a "Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago" (payment processing certificate) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Secretaría de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira. It covers the 8th payment (FEWA-112, dated 2022-11-02) for October 2022 school feeding services under Contract No. 029/2022. The document records a payable amount of COP $114,404,192 (no IVA, no amortization). The supervisor/interventor ADAULFO ADOLFO MANJARRES MEJIA (CC 17.957.744, Secretario de Educación Departamental, Gobernación de La Guajira) signed on 5 December 2022, certifying that the supplier fulfilled the service to satisfaction. Warehouse entry GJR2022ER14614 was registered on 29 November 2022, confirming receipt. The document also shows cumulative invoices FEWA-91 through FEWA-108 totalling COP $1,062,216,072 already disbursed, with a contract total value of COP $1,366,614,264 (including additions). Execution stands at 86.1%. The SECOP row invoice total of 11,440,419 does not match the PDF value of 114,404,192 — likely a data-entry error (missing a zero) in SECOP.
red_flags: SECOP row invoice_total (11,440,419) does not match PDF stated payable amount (114,404,192) — likely a SECOP data-entry error (factor of ~10 difference / missing digit).
Supplier name in PDF ('WAYUU ARAURAYU') is an abbreviated/alternate name vs. known contract supplier name; NIT 825.001.057 DV 7 should be verified against contract.
Invoice FEWA-112 date (2022-11-02) precedes the warehouse receipt date (2022-11-29), which is normal but should be confirmed.
Contract reference in PDF is 'Contrato No. 029 DE 2022' (local number) — cross-reference to SECOP ID CO1.PCCNTR.3534069 should be confirmed.
No explicit IVA breakdown; zero IVA assumed for PAE service contract — verify tax-exempt status.

contract_references: Registro Presupuestal 561 de 28 de enero de 2022
claude.evidence_summary: Informe Parcial de Supervisión No. 7 – Programa de Alimentación Escolar Vigencia 2022, correspondiente al mes de septiembre 2022. El documento certifica un avance físico del 94,6% de las obligaciones contractuales. Se acredita: (1) certificados de cobertura atendida firmados por directoras del C.E. Uliyunakat y C.E. Caracas Ruleyas; (2) planillas de registro y control de asistencia mes de septiembre; (3) certificado de cumplimiento de pago al sistema de seguridad social expedido por revisora fiscal con fecha 20/10/2022; (4) planillas de seguridad social del personal administrativo; (5) pólizas de garantía vigentes; (6) acta de entrega de elementos de aseo; (7) certificado de limpieza y desinfección; (8) informe de ejecución de recursos; (9) factura FEWA-111 presentada y aceptada por valor de $180.069.296. El supervisor verifica cumplimiento de aportes parafiscales (marcado SI). Entrega de producto confirmada (Sí X) para obligaciones 1, 2, 3, 6, 7, 9, 10. Obligación 8 (participación en comités) marcada No entregada/N/A. Los recursos PAE están exentos de IVA, impuestos, tasas, estampillas y contribuciones departamentales conforme Ordenanza Departamental N°388 de 2014.
red_flags: Supplier name in PDF ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES DE LA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP registered name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA GUAJIRA') — verify legal name match before payment.
Obligation 8 (participation in Comité Dinamizadores PAE) not fulfilled — no acta de realización del comité presented; product delivery marked No/N/A.
Social security payment planillas for obligation 4 not fully delivered (product delivery field left blank, not marked Sí X).
Financial balance table (page 6) is partially illegible/low resolution — exact ration counts and cumulative payment figures cannot be fully verified from the scan.
Invoice date from SECOP context (2022-10-28) is after the service period (September 2022) — normal for PAE billing cycle but should be confirmed.
Contract value (1,122,963,840 COP) vs. cumulative payments to date not fully readable from scanned financial table on page 6.
claude.reason: The Informe Parcial de Supervisión No. 7 constitutes valid supervision/acceptance support for invoice FEWA-111 (COP 180,069,296) for September 2022 PAE services. The supervisor certifies 94.6% physical execution, delivery certificates from school directors are on file, social security compliance is certified, guarantees are current, and the invoice amount matches the value stated in the supervision report. The minor supplier name discrepancy and the unmet obligation 8 (committee participation) do not block payment under PAE rules, but the name discrepancy should be formally noted. The document is readable and the evidence chain is substantially complete. Recommended action: approve with notation of supplier name variance and obligation 8 non-compliance.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a monthly activity report (Informe Mensual de Actividades) for August 2022 submitted by Asociación Wayuu Araurayu under Contract 029 de 2022 for the PAE school feeding programme at Centros Etnoeducativos Caracas Ruleya and Uliyunakat in Manaure, La Guajira. The document records 67,958 AM food supplements actually delivered out of 77,748 programmed (87.4% delivery rate) for 3,534 beneficiaries over 22 school days. It also includes a contractual obligations compliance report (Informe de Obligaciones Contractuales) covering preparatory and operational phases, all reported at 100% progress. Verification sources cited include cleaning/disinfection certificates, food handler aptitude certificates, sanitary inspection records, staff payroll records, and delivery acts. The document constitutes supervision/completion support evidence for invoice FEWA 108. No monetary totals appear in the PDF itself; the invoice total of COP 179,952,784 is known from the SECOP row context only.

claude.evidence_summary: Informe Parcial de Supervisión No. 6 del Programa de Alimentación Escolar (PAE) Vigencia 2022, correspondiente al mes de agosto 2022. El documento acredita: (1) ejecución física al 78,6%; (2) entrega de productos confirmada (Entrega producto Sí X) en múltiples obligaciones contractuales; (3) balance financiero con valor total ejecutado de $626.315.552 sobre contrato de $1.122.963.840, con pagos acumulados de $702.193.992 (63%); (4) valor causado no pagado de $179.952.784 correspondiente al período de agosto; (5) cumplimiento de aportes parafiscales verificado (SI X); (6) pólizas de garantía vigentes (responsabilidad civil 11-40-101046264 y cumplimiento estatal 11-44-101184230). El supervisor verificó la ejecución en C.E. Uliyunakat y C.E. Caracas Ruleyas. El invoice FEWA 108 por $179.952.784 corresponde al valor causado no pagado registrado en el balance financiero.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a two-page Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago (payment order / compliance certificate) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Secretaría de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira. It covers the 5th payment (mes de Julio 2022) under Contract No. 029/2022 for school feeding services. The document records invoice FEWA-105 dated 12 August 2022 with a payable value of COP 115,516,352 (Valor Base de la Factura: 115,516,352; IVA: 0; Valor a Pagar: 115,516,352). The warehouse entry number GJR2022ER0010137 dated 29 August 2022 confirms product/service receipt. Supervisor/Interventor ADAULFO ADOLFO MANJARRES MEJIA (CC 17.957.744, Secretario de Educación Departamental, Gobernación de La Guajira) signed on 27 October 2022 certifying that the supplier fulfilled the contract specifications and all legal requirements for payment authorization. Prior payments recorded: FEWA-91 (Marzo, COP 114,353,880), FEWA-92 (Abril, COP 155,564,704), FEWA-95 (Mayo, COP 176,444,184), FEWA-97 (Junio, COP 140,314,872). Total contract value: COP 1,122,963,840; % Ejecución: 62.5%; Total girado: COP 586,677,640.
red_flags: Supplier name on document ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') includes additional text 'WAYUU ARAURAYU' not present in SECOP contract supplier name — minor discrepancy, likely same entity
Supervisor signature date (27 October 2022) is approximately 2 months after the warehouse entry date (29 August 2022) — delayed certification
No individual ration/meal quantity breakdown provided in this payment certificate; quantities billed per beneficiary not itemized
claude.reason: The document is a fully completed Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago with a clearly stated invoice number (FEWA-105), invoice date (12 Aug 2022), payable amount (COP 115,516,352), warehouse/document entry confirmation (GJR2022ER0010137, 29 Aug 2022), and supervisor certification signed by the Secretario de Educación Departamental. The invoice total matches the SECOP known value of 115,516,352. The contract reference (No. 029/2022) aligns with CO1.PCCNTR.3534069. Delivery/receipt is confirmed. Minor red flags (name suffix, delayed signature) do not block payment. Recommend approval.

claude.evidence_summary: This is Informe Parcial de Supervisión No. 5 (Partial Supervision Report No. 5) for the PAE (School Feeding Programme) contract 029/2022, covering the month of July 2022. The document is issued by the Gobernación de La Guajira – Secretaría de Educación Departamental and covers the contractor ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARE DE LA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU. Physical execution progress is reported at 62.5%. The report confirms delivery of: attendance/registration sheets for July, coverage certificates from school directors of C.E. Uliyunakat and C.E. Caracas Ruleyas, social security payment planillas for administrative staff, civil liability and accident insurance policies, cleaning/disinfection certificates, and a resource execution report. The financial balance shows total payments made of $596,677,540 (52% of contract value of $1,122,963,840), with the July period (JUNIO row) showing $140,314,872. The value "causado no pagado" (accrued unpaid) is $115,516,332, consistent with the SECOP invoice total of $115,516,352. No advance (anticipo) was stipulated. Social security compliance was verified (SI marked). The document constitutes supervision acceptance of services rendered in July 2022.

claude.evidence_summary: Electronic invoice FEWA-97 issued 2022-07-06 by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT 825001057-7) to Departamento de La Guajira Secretaría de Educación (NIT 892115015-1) for the fourth payment of the School Feeding Programme (PAE) for June 2022 under Contrato 329 de 2022. Invoice total COP 140,314,872 with zero IVA and zero discount. Payment method: bank debit transfer, payment date 20/07/2022. The invoice footer states "declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción", constituting acceptance of delivery. CUFE and digital signature present. SECOP context confirms invoice paid.
red_flags: Supplier name on PDF ('ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA') differs slightly from SECOP contract record ('ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') – likely typographic variant, verify NIT match (825001057-7)
Buyer on invoice is 'Departamento de La Guajira Secretaría de Educación' while SECOP buyer is 'GOBERNACIÓN DE LA GUAJIRA' – confirm these are the same legal entity
Contract reference on invoice is 'Contrato 329 de 2022' while SECOP ID is CO1.PCCNTR.3534069 – cross-reference needed to confirm alignment
No standalone acta de entrega or supervision acceptance document attached; delivery acceptance relies solely on the invoice footer clause
claude.reason: The electronic invoice FEWA-97 is complete and internally consistent: invoice number, issue date, due date, service period, line item, subtotal, tax, and total are all clearly stated. The CUFE and digital signature are present, confirming authenticity. The invoice footer clause ("declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción") constitutes acceptance of delivery. SECOP context confirms the invoice has already been paid (20/07/2022). Minor supplier name and buyer name discrepancies appear to be typographic/administrative variants rather than substantive mismatches (NIT numbers align). The contract reference discrepancy (329 de 2022 vs CO1.PCCNTR.3534069) should be cross-checked but does not block approval given the matching object description and SECOP context. Recommend approval subject to confirming NIT and contract cross-reference.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a two-page "Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago" (payment compliance certificate) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Secretaría de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira. Page 1 identifies invoice FEWA-97 dated 06/07/2022 for COP 140,314,872 (fourth payment for June 2022 services under Contract No. 029/2022). The document records prior payments FEWA-91 (March, COP 114,353,880), FEWA-92 (April, COP 155,564,704), and FEWA-95 (May, COP 176,444,184), totalling COP 446,362,768 already disbursed. The contract total is COP 1,122,963,840 with 52.2% execution. Page 2 contains the supervisor's certification signed on 22 July 2022 by FABIAN ENRIQUE ACOSTA PERALTA (Secretario de Educación Departamental, CC 8.520.855, Gobernación de La Guajira), certifying that the supplier fulfilled the service specifications satisfactorily and all legal requirements for payment are met. Document entry number GJR2022ER007714 was registered on 08/07/2022. Supplier bank account: Banco Davivienda, savings account 236000721530. The paid flag from SECOP context confirms payment was executed.
red_flags: Supplier name on PDF ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') includes the suffix 'WAYUU ARAURAYU' not present in the SECOP contract context name; minor discrepancy to verify.
No warehouse/almacén entry number recorded on page 2 (service contract, so this is expected but noted)
Valor Causado No Pagado (COP 140,314,872) matches current invoice, confirming it was accrued but pending disbursement at document date — consistent with payment order flow
claude.reason: All key AP conditions are met: invoice number FEWA-97 is present and matches SECOP context; invoice total COP 140,314,872 is clearly stated and matches the SECOP paid amount; the service period (June 2022, fourth payment) is described; the supervisor FABIAN ENRIQUE ACOSTA PERALTA signed the compliance certificate on 22 July 2022 certifying satisfactory delivery ("cumplió a satisfacción"); the document entry GJR2022ER007714 was registered on 08/07/2022; contract reference No. 029/2022 is consistent with CO1.PCCNTR.3534069; IVA is zero (service contract); and SECOP confirms payment was executed. The minor supplier name suffix discrepancy does not constitute a blocking issue.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a Certificación de Cobertura Atendida (Coverage Certification / Delivery Support) issued by the Ministerio de Educación Nacional. It certifies that 52,989 food rations (Complemento Alimentario AM/PM) were delivered across two rural ethnoeducational centers in Manaure, La Guajira during June 1–24, 2022 (17 school days). The document is signed on July 5, 2022 by the legal representative Rafael Angel Iguaran Montiel (CC 84,040,046 de Maicao). The grand total cost certified is $140,314,872 COP at a unit price of $2,648 per ration. This document serves as delivery/receipt proof supporting invoice FEWA 97.
red_flags: Supplier name on PDF ('ASOCIACIÓN WAYUU ARAURAYU') does not exactly match the known SECOP supplier ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA GUAJIRA') — possible operator vs. contractor discrepancy; verify entity relationship.
Contract reference on PDF is '029 DE 2022' only; SECOP contract ID CO1.PCCNTR.3534069 is not explicitly printed on the document.
Invoice total is not stated on this PDF; the $140,314,872 figure represents the certified delivery cost, not a formal invoice total — invoice_total left null per AP rules.
NIT on document (825001057-7) should be verified against the registered NIT of the known supplier.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a monthly activity report (Informe Mensual de Actividades) for June 2022 under Contract 029 de 2022, issued by Asociación Wayuu Araurayu (NIT 825001057-7) for the PAE school feeding program at Centros Etnoeducativos Caracas Ruleya and Uliyunakat in Manaure, La Guajira. The document reports 52,989 AM complement rations actually delivered out of 60,078 programmed (17 school days, 3,534 beneficiaries), with 7,089 undelivered. It includes a contractual obligations compliance report (Informe de Obligaciones Contractuales) covering readiness and operational phases, all reported at 100% developed. The document serves as supervision/completion support for invoice FEWA 97. No invoice total is stated in the PDF itself; the invoice total of 140,314,872 COP is known from the SECOP row context. Delivery of the service for June 2022 is evidenced by the activity report and compliance tables.
red_flags: Invoice total (140,314,872 COP) is NOT stated in the PDF itself — it comes only from the external SECOP invoice row; invoice_total has been left null per extraction rules.
7,089 AM complement rations were NOT delivered in June 2022 out of 60,078 programmed (shortfall ~11.8%); partial non-delivery may affect payable amount.
Cumulative undelivered rations across Feb–Jun 2022 total 116,361 out of 336,730 programmed (~34.6% shortfall); significant cumulative delivery gap.
February 2022 shows 0 rations actually delivered out of 56,544 programmed — full month non-delivery.
No explicit 'recibido a satisfacción' or signed acceptance certificate (acta de recibo a satisfacción) is visible in the scanned pages provided.
Document is a scanned PDF; some figures may be difficult to verify precisely from OCR.

claude.evidence_summary: Electronic invoice FEWA-95 issued by Asociación de Jefes Familiares Wayuu de la Zona Norte de la Alta Guajira (NIT 825001057-7) to the Departamento de La Guajira Secretaría de Educación (NIT 892115015-1) on 2022-06-06 for the third payment of the School Feeding Programme (PAE) for May 2022 under Contrato 029 de 2022. Invoice total is COP 176,444,184 with zero IVA and zero discount. Payment method is recorded as Contado / Transferencia Débito Bancaria with a payment date of 20/06/2022, and the invoice footer states acceptance implies receipt of goods and services to satisfaction ("una vez aceptada declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción"), providing moderate delivery evidence. The invoice bears a valid CUFE and digital signature from e-Factura/Cadena.
red_flags: Supplier legal name on invoice ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA') differs slightly from SECOP contract name ('...DE LA LA GUAJIRA') – likely a data-entry variant but should be confirmed.
Buyer on invoice is 'DEPARTAMENTO DE LA GUAJIRA SECRETARÍA DE EDUCACIÓN' while SECOP contract buyer is 'GOBERNACIÓN DE LA GUAJIRA' – same entity but different naming; verify NIT match (892115015-1).
Delivery proof relies solely on the standard invoice acceptance clause; no separate acta de entrega, supervision certificate, or recibido a satisfacción document is attached.
Invoice references 'Contrato 029 de 2022' internally but SECOP contract ID is CO1.PCCNTR.3534069 – cross-reference should be validated.
IVA is 0 – supplier is listed as 'No responsable de IVA'; confirm tax regime is correct for this type of service contract.
claude.reason: The electronic invoice is well-formed, the amount (COP 176,444,184) matches the SECOP paid record, and the payment date (20/06/2022) is recorded. However, delivery evidence rests only on the standard invoice acceptance clause rather than a dedicated supervision or delivery certificate. Minor supplier/buyer name discrepancies and the internal contract reference ('029 de 2022' vs. CO1.PCCNTR.3534069) should be reconciled before final approval. Recommend requesting the supervision/acceptance act (acta de supervisión) to fully satisfy AP delivery-proof requirements.

Invoice total is COP 176,444,184 with zero IVA and zero discount. Payment method is recorded as Contado / Transferencia Débito Bancaria with a payment date of 20/06/2022, and the invoice footer states acceptance implies receipt of goods and services to satisfaction ("una vez aceptada declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción"), providing moderate delivery evidence. claude.evidence_summary: This is a two-page Colombian SECOP "Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago" (payment order / compliance certificate) issued by the Secretaría de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira. Page 1 records invoice FEWA-95 dated 06-Jun-2022 for COP 176,444,184 (third payment for May 2022 services under Contract No. 29/2022). The financial balance shows: contract value COP 1,122,963,840; total disbursed COP 269,918,584 (invoices FEWA-91 for March COP 114,353,880 and FEWA-92 for April COP 155,564,704 previously paid); current invoice FEWA-95 for May COP 176,444,184; execution rate 39.7%. Page 2 contains the supervisor certification signed on 22-Jun-2022 by FABIAN ENRIQUE ACOSTA PERALTA (CC 8.520.855, Secretario de Educación Departamental, Gobernación de La Guajira), certifying that the supplier fulfilled the service to satisfaction. Document entry number GJR2022ER006859 was registered on 13-Jun-2022. The supplier NIT is 825.001.057 DV 7, bank account Davivienda savings account 236000721530. IVA is zero; no advance amortization applies.
red_flags: Supplier name on document ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP context name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — likely same entity, verify NIT 825.001.057.

Invoice FEWA-95 is the current payment document but the table on page 1 only lists FEWA-91 (March) and FEWA-92 (April) as previously paid; FEWA-93 and FEWA-94 are not referenced — possible gap in invoice sequence.
No explicit unit quantity (number of rations/students/days) is stated in the invoice; service quantity is not itemised.

Valor Causado No Pagado (COP 176,444,184) plus Valor Ejecutado (COP 446,362,768) and Valor Total Girado (COP 269,918,584) do not sum to contract value — partial execution at 39.7% is noted but warrants verification.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a Ministerio de Educación Nacional "Certificación de Cobertura Atendida" (PAE coverage certification) signed by the legal representative Rafael Angel Iguaran Montiel (CC 84.040.046 de Maicao) on June 2, 2022. It certifies delivery of 66,633 food rations (Complemento Alimentario AM/PM) across two etnoeducativo rural centers in Manaure, La Guajira during May 2–31, 2022 under Contract 029 de 2022. The document explicitly states it is issued as a payment support ("soporte de pago") based on daily beneficiary registers. Total certified value is $176,444,184 COP at a unit cost of $2,648 per ration. Delivery quantities match programmed quantities (no novedades), confirming full delivery acceptance.

Contract reference on PDF is '029 DE 2022' while known SECOP contract ID is 'CO1.PCCNTR.3534069' — these should be confirmed as the same contract
No explicit invoice number printed on this delivery certificate; invoice number FEWA 95 is sourced from SECOP row context, not from the PDF itself

claude.evidence_summary: This is a monthly activity report (Informe Mensual de Actividades) for May 2022 submitted by Asociación Wayuu Araurayu under Contract 029 de 2022 (SECOP CO1.PCCNTR.3534069) with the Secretaría de Educación Departamental de La Guajira. The document reports: (1) a delivery table showing 66,633 AM complemento rations actually delivered in May 2022 out of 74,214 programmed (21 school days, 3,534 beneficiaries); (2) a contractual obligations compliance report (Informe de Obligaciones Contractuales) covering both the alistamiento and operación phases, all items reported at 100% developed, including sanitation, pest control, food handler certifications, transport routes, supplier database, staff contracting, PAE information posting, signage, and training on basic sanitation plan. The document constitutes supervision/completion support evidence for the May 2022 billing period. No invoice total is stated in the PDF itself; the invoice total of 176,444,184 COP is sourced from the SECOP row context, not from this attachment.

claude.evidence_summary: Informe Parcial de Supervisión No. 3 del Programa de Alimentación Escolar (PAE) Vigencia 2022, emitido por la Gobernación de La Guajira - Secretaría de Educación Departamental. Corresponde al Contrato/Convenio 029 de 2022 con la Asociación de Jefes Familiares de la Guajira Wayuu Araurayu. El informe certifica un avance físico del 39.7% a la fecha de corte (mayo 2022). El supervisor verificó: (1) planillas de seguridad social del personal administrativo, (2) certificado de cumplimiento de pago al sistema de seguridad social expedido por el Representante Legal, (3) planillas de registro y control de asistencia mes de abril, (4) certificados de cobertura atendida expedidos por las directoras del C.E. Uliyunakat y C.E. Caracas Ruleyas, (5) acta de entrega de elementos de aseo, (6) certificado de limpieza y desinfección, (7) informe de ejecución de recursos, (8) acta de capacitación continua al personal dinamizador, (9) acta de plan de remisión de víveres, (10) acta de apertura buzón de sugerencias, (11) formato de compras locales, (12) pólizas de responsabilidad civil extracontractual (No. 11-40-101046264) y cumplimiento estatal (No. 11-44-101184230) vigentes. El operador presentó factura FEWA-95 por $176.444.184 M/L para el mes de mayo. El balance financiero muestra pagos realizados de $269.918.584 (24% del valor total del contrato de $1.122.963.840). No se estipuló anticipo. El contrato no generó rendimientos financieros. El supervisor verificó cumplimiento de aportes parafiscales (SI).
red_flags: Supplier name in PDF ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARE DE LA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP registered name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA GUAJIRA') - possible abbreviation or transcription variant; verify NIT match
Obligation No. 8 (Comité Dinamizador PAE) shows non-compliance: C.E. Uliyunakat and C.E. Caracas Ruleya did not form the dinamizador committee
Obligation No. 4 (SISS payments) - delivery product field left blank (neither SI nor NO marked), suggesting incomplete documentation for one staff member (Holver Velasquez Deluque, April planilla)
Invoice quantity (number of rations served) not explicitly stated in the supervision report; coverage certificate referenced but not reproduced in this PDF
Cumulative payments ($269.918.584) represent only 24% of contract value ($1.122.963.840) while physical execution is reported at 39.7% - financial execution lags physical execution

claude.evidence_summary: Electronic invoice FEWA-91 issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT: 825001057-7) to the Departamento de La Guajira Secretaría de Educación (NIT: 892115015-1) for COP 114,353,880. The invoice covers the first payment for the School Feeding Programme (PAE) for March 2022 under Contrato 029 de 2022, referencing SECOP contract CO1.PCCNTR.3534069. The document states it is an electronic sales invoice (Factura Electrónica de Venta) with a CUFE code, issued 2022-05-25, due 2022-06-25, paid via bank debit transfer on 2022-06-08. The footer states 'Esta factura es un título valor de acuerdo al art. 774 del C.C. y una vez aceptada declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción,' constituting implicit receipt confirmation. No explicit acta de entrega or supervision certificate is present in this single-page PDF. Supplier name on invoice differs slightly from SECOP record (Alta Guajira vs. La Guajira) — minor variation. Invoice total (114,353,880) is well within contract value (1,122,963,840).
red_flags: Supplier name on invoice ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA') differs slightly from SECOP record ('...DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — minor but worth noting
No explicit acta de entrega, supervision certificate, or recibido a satisfacción stamp visible; receipt is implied only by the standard invoice footer clause
Buyer on invoice is 'DEPARTAMENTO DE LA GUAJIRA SECRETARÍA DE EDUCACIÓN' while SECOP buyer is 'GOBERNACIÓN DE LA GUAJIRA' — possible entity naming discrepancy
Internal contract reference is 'CONTRATO 029 DE 2022' which should be cross-checked against SECOP contract CO1.PCCNTR.3534069

extractions.excerpt: Electronic invoice FEWA-91 issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT: 825001057-7) to the Departamento de La Guajira Secretaría de Educación (NIT: 892115015-1) for COP 114,353,880. The invoice covers the first payment for the School Feeding Programme (PAE) for March 2022 under Contrato 029 de 2022, referencing SECOP contract CO1.PCCNTR.3534069. The document states it is an electronic sales invoice (Factura Electrónica de Venta) with a CUFE code, issued 2022-05-25, due 2022-06-25, paid via bank debit transfer on 2022-06-08. The footer states 'Esta factura es un título valor de acuerdo al art. 774 del C.C. y una vez aceptada declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción,' constituting implicit receipt confirmation. No explicit acta de entrega or supervision certificate is present in this single-page PDF. Supplier name on invoice differs slightly from SECOP record (Alta Guajira vs. La Guajira) — minor variation. Invoice total (114,353,880) is well within contract value (1,122,963,840).

claude.evidence_summary: Two-page Colombian SECOP payment certification document (Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Secretaría de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira. Page 1 identifies the supplier (NIT 825.001.057-7), contract No. 29/2022, service period March 2022, invoice FEWA-91 dated 2022-05-25, and a payable amount of COP 114,353,880 (10.2% execution of total contract value of COP 1,122,963,840). Page 2 contains the supervisor/interventor certification signed by FABIAN ENRIQUE ACOSTA PERALTA (CC 8.520.855, Secretario de Educación Departamental, Gobernación de La Guajira) on 17 June 2022, certifying that the supplier fulfilled the service to satisfaction. Document management entry GJR2022ER005989 dated 6 June 2022 is also recorded. No IVA applied. No advance (anticipo) recorded.
red_flags: Supplier name on document ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP context name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — likely same entity, possible transcription variant

Contract internal reference is 'Contrato No. 029 del 2022' / 'Orden de Servicio 29 DE 2022'; SECOP contract ID CO1.PCCNTR.3534069 not printed on the face of the document — cross-reference relies on external context
Valor Total Girado (field 10) is redacted/blacked out on the document, preventing full payment history verification
Valor Anticipo fields are blacked out — cannot confirm whether any advance was disbursed previously
No specific ration/meal quantities (number of students or rations) are stated in this payment order; service quantities are not itemised

claude.evidence_summary: Electronic invoice FEWA-92 issued 25/05/2022 by Asociación de Jefes Familiares Wayuu de la Zona Norte de la Alta Guajira (NIT 825001057-7) to Departamento de La Guajira Secretaría de Educación for the second payment of the April 2022 school-feeding service (PAE) at two rural ethno-educational institutions in Manaure. Invoice total is COP 155,564,704 with zero IVA and zero discount. Payment method is bank debit transfer dated 08/06/2022. The document footer states "acepta declarar haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción", constituting receipt confirmation. CUFE is present. Invoice number on the PDF (FEWA-92) differs from the SECOP row invoice number (FEWA-91) and the invoice total on the PDF (155,564,704) differs from the SECOP payable amount (114,353,880), both flagged as red flags.
red_flags: Invoice number mismatch: PDF shows FEWA-92 but SECOP row references FEWA-91
Invoice total mismatch: PDF states COP 155,564,704 but SECOP payable amount is COP 114,353,880 — difference of COP 41,210,824

Supplier name on PDF ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA') differs slightly from SECOP supplier name ('...DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — likely a data-entry duplicate word in SECOP but should be verified
No standalone delivery certificate (acta de entrega/supervisión) visible in this single-page PDF; receipt is only evidenced by the standard e-invoice footer clause
Contract local reference is '029 DE 2022' — cross-reference to CO1.PCCNTR.3534069 should be confirmed in SECOP

It certifies delivery of 43,185 complemento alimentario AM/PM rations across two rural ethnoeducational centres in Manaure, La Guajira, during 10–31 March 2022 (15 school days), at a unit cost of $2,648 COP, for a grand total of $114,353,880 COP. The document is signed and constitutes formal delivery proof (soporte de pago). The SECOP invoice row confirms invoice FEWA 91 for $114,353,880 COP, dated 2022-05-25, marked as paid.

claude.evidence_summary: The PDF is a Colombian electronic invoice (Factura Electrónica de Venta) FEWA-91 issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT: 825001057-7) to the Departamento de La Guajira Secretaría de Educación (NIT: 892115015-1) for COP 114,353,880. It covers the first payment for the School Feeding Programme (PAE) for March 2022 under Contrato 029 de 2022, for services at Centro Etnoeducativo Rural No.1 Caracas Ruleya and Institución Etnoeducativa Rural No.2 Uliyunakat, Municipio de Manaure. The invoice states payment was made by bank debit transfer on 08/06/2022, and the footer declares receipt of goods/services to satisfaction ("declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción"). The invoice is digitally signed and has a valid CUFE. However, the SECOP context references invoice FEWA-92 with a total of COP 155,564,704, while this PDF shows FEWA-91 for COP 114,353,880 — a mismatch on both invoice number and amount.
red_flags: Invoice number mismatch: SECOP context references FEWA-92 but PDF shows FEWA-91
Invoice total mismatch: SECOP context states COP 155,564,704 but PDF shows COP 114,353,880
Supplier name slight variation: PDF header says 'ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA' vs contract context 'ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA'
No standalone delivery/reception certificate (acta de entrega) attached; receipt declared only via invoice footer clause
PDF invoice total (114,353,880) is significantly lower than SECOP-recorded payable (155,564,704) — possible wrong attachment uploaded
claude.reason: The PDF invoice (FEWA-91, COP 114,353,880) does not match the SECOP-registered invoice (FEWA-92, COP 155,564,704) in either invoice number or total amount. This suggests the wrong PDF attachment may have been uploaded, or there is a data entry discrepancy in SECOP. AP should request the correct invoice document matching FEWA-92 and reconcile the amount difference before approving payment.

claude.evidence_summary: Two-page Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago (payment order) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Secretaría de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira. Page 1 records invoice FEWA-91 dated 25 May 2022 for COP 114,353,880 (in letters: "CIENTO CATORCE MILLONES TRESCIENTOS CINCUENTA Y TRES MIL OCHOCIENTOS OCHENTA PESOS"), representing the first payment for March 2022 services under Contract 029/2022. The contract total is COP 1,122,963,840; execution to date is 10.2% (COP 114,353,880 caused/unpaid, COP 114,353,880 executed). Page 2 contains the supervisor's certification of satisfactory compliance signed on 17 June 2022 by FABIAN ENRIQUE ACOSTA PERALTA (CC 8.520.855), Secretario de Educación Departamental, Gobernación de La Guajira, with document management entry GJR2022ER005989 dated 6 June 2022.
red_flags: Invoice number in PDF is FEWA-91 but SECOP context references invoice FEWA-92 — possible mismatch or this is a different payment instalment
Invoice total in PDF is COP 114,353,880 but SECOP context states invoice total of COP 155,564,704 — significant discrepancy

Supplier name in PDF (ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU) differs slightly from SECOP context name (ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA) — verify NIT 825.001.057
Contract referenced in PDF is N°029 DE 2022 (internal number); SECOP contract ID CO1.PCCNTR.3534069 should be confirmed as the same contract
Valor Causado No Pagado and Valor Ejecutado both show 114,353,880 suggesting payment has not yet been disbursed at document creation date
Bank account details present (Banco Davivienda, cuenta 2360007721530, ahorro) — should be verified against registered supplier account
claude.reason: The document is a properly signed and supervised payment order (Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago) with supervisor certification of satisfactory service delivery for March 2022. However, there is a material discrepancy between the invoice number (FEWA-91 in PDF vs. FEWA-92 in SECOP context) and the invoice total (COP 114,353,880 in PDF vs. COP 155,564,704 in SECOP context). These mismatches must be clarified before payment can be approved. Additionally, the slight supplier name variation and the internal vs. SECOP contract reference should be confirmed. Request supporting documentation to reconcile the invoice number and amount discrepancies.

Single line item for the second payment for April 2022 school-feeding services (PAE) at two rural ethno-educational institutions in Manaure under Contrato 029 de 2022. Invoice total COP 155,564,704 with zero IVA and zero discount. Payment method: bank debit transfer, payment date 08/06/2022. The document footer states "acepta declarar haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción", constituting receipt confirmation. CUPE and digital signature present. Matches SECOP record: invoice FEWA-92, date 2022-05-25, total 155,564,704, marked paid.

Buyer on invoice is 'DEPARTAMENTO DE LA GUAJIRA SECRETARÍA DE EDUCACIÓN' while SECOP context lists buyer as 'GOBERNACIÓN DE LA GUAJIRA' – functionally the same entity but label differs.
Internal contract reference on invoice is 'CONTRATO 029 DE 2022'; SECOP contract ID is CO1.PCCNTR.3534069 – cross-reference should be verified.
No standalone acta de entrega or supervisor acceptance document visible in this PDF; receipt confirmed only by the standard e-invoice footer clause ('recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción').

claude.evidence_summary: This is a "Certificación de Cobertura Atendida" (delivery/coverage certificate) issued under Contract 029 de 2022 by operator ASOCIACIÓN WAYUU ARAURAYU, signed by legal representative RAFAEL ANGEL IGUARAN MONTIEL (CC 84.049.046 de Maicao) in April 2022. It certifies delivery of 43,185 food rations (complemento alimentario AM/PM) across two rural ethno-educational centres in Manaure, La Guajira, during 10–31 March 2022, at a unit cost of $2,648 COP, totalling $114,353,880 COP. The document is a delivery support/receipt, not an invoice. The SECOP invoice total for FEWA 92 is $155,564,704 COP (from context), which is higher than the $114,353,880 COP certified here, suggesting this certificate covers only a portion of the billed period or scope.

claude.evidence_summary: Two-page "Certificado de Entrega de Raciones a Instituciones Educativas" (delivery receipt certificates) signed on 2 May 2022 by the school rectors/directors. Page 1 covers Centro Etnoeducativo Rural No 1 Caracas Ruleya (and 8 associated rural indigenous schools), certifying delivery of 25,118 total rations over 19 school days in April 2022, signed by Rector Shirley Barrios Rojas (CC 40.932.902). Pages 2–3 cover Centro Etnoeducativo Rural No 2 Uliyunakat (and 18 associated rural indigenous schools), certifying delivery of 33,630 total rations over up to 19 school days in April 2022, signed by Director Jackeline Epieyu González (CC 40.984.555). Both certificates are issued under Contract No. 029 de 2022 by operator Asociación Wayuu Araurayu. The document explicitly states it is issued as payment support ("soporte de pago") based on daily rights-holder registers.
red_flags: Supplier name on document (ASOCIACIÓN WAYUU ARAURAYU) does not exactly match known contract supplier (ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA GUAJIRA) — possible operator vs. contractor discrepancy requiring clarification.
No invoice number present; this is a delivery certificate, not an invoice.
No monetary amounts stated; invoice_total cannot be determined from this document alone.
Page 2 (Centro No 2 Uliyunakat) shows 15 days attended in the TOTAL row but individual school rows show 19 days — internal inconsistency in days attended.
Two schools in Centro No 2 (Escuela Rural Indígena Santana and Walishitao) show 0 rations delivered despite 19 days listed — possible service gap.
claude.reason: The document is a signed delivery certificate ("Certificado de Entrega de Raciones") that constitutes valid delivery proof for 25,118 rations (Centro No 1) and 33,630 rations (Centro No 2) during April 2022, and explicitly states it serves as payment support. However, the supplier name on the certificate (Asociación Wayuu Araurayu) does not match the known contract supplier name, no invoice or monetary total is present, and there is an internal inconsistency in days attended for Centro No 2 (15 vs. 19 days). Additional clarification on the supplier identity discrepancy and a matching invoice are required before AP approval.

Contract reference on document is '029 DE 2022', not the SECOP ID CO1.PCCNTR.3534069 — cross-reference should be confirmed.
No invoice number present; this is a coverage/delivery certificate, not a formal invoice.
Total certified value ($155,564,704 COP) represents a single monthly period; no invoice or payment order number is attached to confirm AP processing.
Novedades column shows 0 — no novelties recorded, which is consistent but should be verified against school attendance records.
Document is scanned/image-based; no machine-readable text layer available, increasing transcription risk.

claude.evidence_summary: Monthly activity report (Informe Mensual de Actividades) for March 2022 submitted by Asociación Wayuu Araurayu under Contract No. 029 de 2022 (SECOP CO1.PCCNTR.3534069). The document covers the PAE school feeding programme at Centros Etnoeducativos Caracas Ruleya and Uliyunakat in Manaure, La Guajira. It reports: (1) a consolidated ration delivery table showing 43,185 complemento AM rations actually delivered in March vs. 77,746 programmed (shortfall of 34,518 in March; cumulative undelivered AM total of 91,167); (2) a detailed obligations compliance table (items 1.1–2.6) covering the start-up phase (alistamiento) and operational phase, all reported at 100% advance with supporting verification sources (sanitary certificates, pest-control records, training certificates, delivery records, menus, signage). The document is a supervision/compliance support document, not an invoice. No invoice number, invoice total, or accounts-payable amount is stated. The contract value of COP 1,122,963,840 appears on page 1 as the contracted amount, not as an invoice total.
red_flags: No invoice number present — this is a supervision/activity report, not an invoice
No invoice total stated; COP 1,122,963,840 is the contract value, not a payable amount
Significant delivery shortfall: only 43,185 of 77,746 programmed AM rations delivered in March 2022 (55.5% delivery rate)

extractions.excerpt: Monthly activity report (Informe Mensual de Actividades) for March 2022 submitted by Asociación Wayuu Araurayu under Contract No. 029 de 2022 (SECOP CO1.PCCNTR.3534069). The document covers the PAE school feeding programme at Centros Etnoeducativos Caracas Ruleya and Uliyunakat in Manaure, La Guajira. It reports: (1) a consolidated ration delivery table showing 43,185 complemento AM rations actually delivered in March vs. 77,746 programmed (shortfall of 34,518 in March; cumulative undelivered AM total of 91,167); (2) a detailed obligations compliance table (items 1.1–2.6) covering the start-up phase (alistamiento) and operational phase, all reported at 100% advance with supporting verification sources (sanitary certificates, pest-control records, training certificates, delivery records, menus, signage). The document is a supervision/compliance support document, not an invoice. No invoice number, invoice total, or accounts-payable amount is stated. The contract value of COP 1,122,963,840 appears on page 1 as the contracted amount, not as an invoice total.

claude.evidence_summary: The document is a certification (constancia) issued on 17 September 2021 by the Secretary of Education of La Guajira (Rosmira Peralta Medina), stating that the supervision support team received to satisfaction the sixth (6th) progress report from the supplier corresponding to July 2021, under contract CO1.PCCNTR.2276440-2021. The supervision report N° 06 and compliance certificate confirm full fulfilment of contractual obligations. The document authorises the sixth payment of COP $206,746,538.39. It is signed by the Secretary of Education and countersigned by three supervision/coverage officers (Glenda García Cotes, Gudiela Gutiérrez Gómez, Gabriel Galván Suárez). No formal invoice number is present; this is a supervision/payment certification, not a standalone invoice.

Minor red flags (no invoice number, buyer entity labelling) are consistent with the Colombian SEIP/ethnic-education contracting model where the Administración Temporal acts as intermediary. Recommend approval subject to confirmation that the underlying informe N° 06 and compliance certificate are on file.
