The document explicitly states the need to pay the 9th instalment of COP $206,746,538.39 per the payment clause (cláusula segunda). Issued 20 December 2021.
red_flags: No formal invoice number present – document is a supervision/payment certification, not a commercial invoice

Supplier name in document ('Asociación de jefes familiares wayuu de la zona norte de la Alta Guajira – Wayuu Araurayu') is slightly different from the registered contract supplier name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') – minor discrepancy, likely same entity

Buyer identified in document is Secretaria de Educación del Departamento de La Guajira / Administración Temporal, whereas contract context lists MEN as buyer – dual-entity arrangement should be confirmed
Payment amount ($206,746,538.39) is a partial/instalment amount; no standalone invoice document attached to verify line-item breakdown
claude.reason: The document is a duly signed supervision certification (certificado de pago) confirming receipt to satisfaction of the 9th progress report for October 2021 under contract CO1.PCCNTR.2276440-2021. It explicitly authorises the 9th contractual payment of COP $206,746,538.39. Two supervisory officials co-signed. The contract reference matches. Minor supplier name discrepancy and absence of a formal invoice number are noted but do not block payment given the official certification. Recommend approval subject to confirmation that no prior payment order for this same instalment has been processed.

claude.reason: The document is a duly signed supervision certification ("certificado de pago") issued by the Secretary of Education of La Guajira on 17 December 2021, confirming satisfactory receipt of the 8th progress report for September 2021 under contract CO1.PCCNTR.2276440-2021 and authorising payment of COP $206,746,538.39. The "recibido a satisfacción" language and three official signatures provide strong delivery evidence. No formal invoice number is present, but the document type (supervision support / payment certification) does not require one. The buyer entity discrepancy (SED Guajira vs. MEN) is consistent with a delegated administration arrangement common in Colombian ethnic education contracts. Recommend approval subject to confirmation that the corresponding invoice/cuenta de cobro from the supplier is on file.

Invoice total is COP 63,439,152 with 0% IVA. Payment method: bank debit transfer. No delivery receipt, supervision acceptance, or acta de recibo a satisfacción is present in this document.
red_flags: Supplier name mismatch: invoice issuer is 'ASOCIACION WAYUU ARAURAYU' (NIT 825001057), but the known SECOP contract supplier is 'ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA GUAJIRA' — these appear to be different legal entities
No delivery proof, supervision acceptance, or 'recibido a satisfacción' document is included; delivered_or_received cannot be confirmed from this PDF alone
Service period on invoice is October 2023, but invoice was issued on 2024-11-27 — over one year gap between service period and invoice date is unusual
Due date equals issue date (2024-11-27), suggesting immediate payment demand with no grace period
claude.reason: The invoice should be blocked pending clarification of the supplier identity mismatch: the invoicing entity (ASOCIACION WAYUU ARAURAYU, NIT 825001057) does not match the contracted supplier (ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA GUAJIRA) registered in SECOP for contract CO1.PCCNTR.4783683 / CPS-167-2023. Additionally, no delivery or supervision acceptance document accompanies this invoice, and the service period (October 2023) is over a year prior to the invoice date (November 2024), which warrants further review before approval.

claude.evidence_summary: El PDF contiene: (1) Matriz de avance económico de la canasta parcial étnica – Asociación Wayuu Araurayu NIT 825001057-7, vigencia 14-10-2023, código C05.01_F06, que muestra el sexto pago ejecutado de $63.439.152 correspondiente a septiembre 2023 y acumulados del contrato por $704.959.836. (2) Tres nóminas de sueldos de octubre 2023 (docentes Jarijinamana, administrativos adtivo, docente tecnólogo) con firmas de elaboración y aprobación. (3) Comprobante de Egreso No. 25223 de Asociación Wayuu Araurayu por $20.090.675 fechado 19/12/2024 para pago nómina docentes Jarijinamana. (4) Comprobante de transacción Davivienda del 19/12/2024 por $20.090.675 con 10 beneficiarios individuales identificados, descripción "PAGO MES OCTUBRE DOCENTE", número de documento 63239118. El pago bancario efectivo está demostrado por el comprobante Davivienda. Sin embargo, el total del comprobante de egreso ($20.090.675) corresponde solo a la nómina docente, mientras que el total facturado según SECOP es $63.439.152, lo que sugiere que el pago total se compone de múltiples comprobantes no todos visibles en este PDF.

claude.evidence_summary: Two-page SECOP payment certificate (Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago) for Contract 167/2023. Page 1 is the financial balance and payment order form showing invoice FEWA-230 dated 2024-03-01 for COP 63,439,152 (CUARTO PAGO / fourth payment). The document records four prior disbursements (FEWA-134, FEWA-156, FEWA-172, FEWA-182) totalling COP 401,805,406.80 against a contract value of COP 704,959,836. Page 2 is the supervisor/interventor certification signed on 9 May 2024 by AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO (Secretaría de Educación del Distrito de Riohacha), certifying that the supplier fulfilled the service to satisfaction per Art. 68 of Law 1687/2013. Document entry number RHC2024ER003492 was registered on 2 May 2024. Supplier bank account: Banco Davivienda S.A., savings account 236000722967. No IVA applied; no advance amortisation. Execution percentage shown as 66%.
red_flags: Supplier name on PDF ('WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP context ('WAYUU DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — likely same entity but name variant should be confirmed.
Invoice FEWA-230 is labelled as a fifth payment event but the payment table only lists four prior invoices (FEWA-134, 156, 172, 182); sequence gap should be verified.

Execution percentage is only 66% yet this appears to be the fourth/final scheduled payment tranche — remaining balance of COP 239,715,277.20 still shown as available to pay, suggesting further payments may follow.
No warehouse/almacén entry number recorded on page 2 (service contract, so expected, but noted for completeness).
claude.reason: Invoice FEWA-230 for COP 63,439,152 is supported by a signed supervisor certification (AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO, Secretaría de Educación) dated 9 May 2024 confirming satisfactory service delivery per Art. 68 of Law 1687/2013. The invoice amount matches the SECOP record, no IVA is charged, no advance amortisation is pending, and the document management entry RHC2024ER003492 is registered. Minor supplier name variant and execution-percentage observations do not block payment but should be noted in the file.

claude.evidence_summary: Acta Parcial No. 005 signed on 09 May 2024 by supervisor AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO (Secretaria de Educación) and contractor legal representative RAFAEL ANGEL IGUARAN MONTIEL. The supervisor certifies that activities were carried out per Contract CPS-167-2023 for the period 01–31 August 2023, with 66% cumulative execution progress. Social security compliance (health, pension, occupational risk) is confirmed via planillas 9463402911-9463424593. The payable amount for this acta is COP $63,439,152. Pending balance after this acta: $239,715,277.20. Document constitutes both a supervision acceptance and partial delivery receipt.
red_flags: Service period (August 2023) is approximately 8–9 months prior to the acta signing date (May 2024), indicating a significant delay in formalizing the partial receipt.

Supervisor AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO notes she was not serving as Secretary of Education during the reported period (01–31 August 2023); she signs based on supporting documents and team input, not direct contemporaneous supervision.
Invoice number FEWA-230 does not appear in the PDF body; it is sourced from the SECOP row context only — no invoice document is attached.
Invoice date in SECOP system (2024-03-01) predates the acta signing date (2024-05-09) by ~2 months, creating a timeline inconsistency.
No explicit 'recibido a satisfacción' stamp or separate delivery receipt is present; acceptance is inferred from supervisor certification language.
claude.reason: The Acta Parcial No. 005 is duly signed by both the entity supervisor and the contractor's legal representative, certifying execution of services for August 2023 under contract CPS-167-2023. The payable amount of COP $63,439,152 matches the SECOP invoice row. Social security compliance is documented. Red flags (delayed signing, supervisor's note about her role during the period) are noted but do not invalidate the document, as she explicitly states she reviewed supporting documents. AP may proceed to payment approval, subject to internal review of the supervisor's role clarification and the invoice date discrepancy.

claude.evidence_summary: Certificación de apoyo a la supervisión emitida el 09 de mayo de 2024 por el Profesional Universitario Auditor José Carlos Rojas Vásquez, Secretaría de Educación del Distrito de Riohacha. Certifica la recepción y verificación del QUINTO INFORME de avances de cumplimiento del Contrato No. 167-2023, correspondiente al período 01 al 31 de agosto de 2023, presentado por ASOCIACIÓN DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA - WAYUU ARAURAYU (NIT: 825.001.057-7). El supervisor constata que el contratista viene cumpliendo con el objeto pactado. El valor certificado corresponde al 66.0% del valor del contrato: $63.439.152,00 COP. El documento constituye aceptación formal de la supervisión del quinto informe de ejecución.
red_flags: El total certificado ($63.439.152) corresponde al 66% del valor del contrato ($96.877.503 aprox.), pero el valor total del contrato conocido es $704.959.836 — el 66% de ese valor sería ~$464.873.491, lo que no coincide con el monto certificado; posible discrepancia en la base de cálculo o el porcentaje aplica sobre un tramo parcial del contrato.
El documento es una certificación de supervisión, no una factura; el invoice_total se toma del contexto SECOP (FEWA-230: $63.439.152) que coincide con el monto mencionado en el PDF.
No se adjunta acta de entrega o remisión formal de bienes/servicios; la aceptación es únicamente del supervisor de apoyo, no del supervisor principal.
La fecha de emisión de la certificación (09 mayo 2024) es significativamente posterior al período de servicio (agosto 2023), lo que puede indicar demora en la formalización documental.
claude.reason: El documento es una certificación válida de apoyo a la supervisión emitida por funcionario competente de la Secretaría de Educación del Distrito de Riohacha. Certifica expresamente que el QUINTO INFORME del Contrato No. 167-2023 fue recibido, revisado y verificado, y que el contratista cumple con el objeto pactado para el período agosto 2023. El monto certificado ($63.439.152 COP) coincide exactamente con el total de la factura FEWA-230 registrada en SECOP. El NIT del proveedor (825.001.057-7) corresponde al contratista registrado. Se recomienda aprobar condicionado a que exista la factura formal FEWA-230 y demás soportes de pago en el expediente contractual.

contract_references: Contrato de prestación de servicios N. 167-2023
claude.evidence_summary: Certificado de supervisión emitido el 09 de mayo de 2024 por la supervisora AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO, Secretaria de Educación del Distrito de Riohacha. Certifica la recepción y verificación del QUINTO INFORME de avances de cumplimiento del contrato N. 167-2023, correspondiente al período del 01 al 31 de agosto de 2023. Confirma que el contratista viene cumpliendo con el objeto pactado y habilita el QUINTO PAGO por $63.439.152,00 (66.0% del valor del contrato). El documento está firmado por la supervisora. Se nota que durante el período reportado la supervisora no fungía como secretaria de educación, pero firmó en virtud de los documentos aportados como soporte.
red_flags: La supervisora AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO declara expresamente que durante el período reportado (01-31 agosto 2023) no fungía como Secretaria de Educación, lo que genera una irregularidad en la cadena de custodia de la supervisión.
El certificado fue emitido el 09 de mayo de 2024, aproximadamente 9 meses después del período de servicio (agosto 2023), lo que representa un retraso significativo.
El porcentaje acumulado indicado (66.0%) para el quinto pago es inusual; normalmente el quinto pago de seis representaría ~83%. Esto puede indicar pagos no lineales o estructura contractual atípica.
No se adjunta acta de entrega o recibido a satisfacción independiente; la aceptación de entrega se basa únicamente en este certificado de supervisión.
El nombre del proveedor en el PDF incluye 'ALTA GUAJIRA' mientras que el contexto del contrato omite 'ALTA'; diferencia menor pero registrada.
claude.reason: El documento es un certificado de supervisión válido firmado que habilita el quinto pago por $63.439.152 COP, y constituye evidencia de aceptación del servicio para el período agosto 2023. Sin embargo, se recomienda solicitar soporte adicional debido a: (1) la supervisora reconoce que no ostentaba el cargo durante el período reportado, lo que debilita la cadena de supervisión formal; (2) el certificado fue emitido con ~9 meses de retraso respecto al período de servicio; (3) el porcentaje acumulado del 66% en el quinto pago no corresponde a una distribución lineal estándar. Se sugiere verificar la delegación o habilitación formal de la supervisora para firmar retroactivamente y confirmar la estructura de pagos del contrato antes de aprobar.

Confirma que el contratista viene cumpliendo con el objeto pactado y habilita el QUINTO PAGO por $63.439.152,00 (66.0% del valor del contrato). El documento está firmado por la supervisora. Se nota que durante el período reportado la supervisora no fungía como secretaria de educación, pero firmó en virtud de los documentos aportados como soporte.

claude.evidence_summary: This is the Fifth Execution Report (Quinto Informe de Ejecución) for Contract N°167 de 2023, submitted by Asociación Wayuu Araurayu to the Alcaldía Distrital de Riohacha. The document reports compliance with all 18 general contractual obligations for the period corresponding to August 2023. It references the electronic invoice FEWA-230 for the 4th of 8 monthly payments valued at COP $63,439,152. Supporting documents mentioned include: social security payment receipts for August, insurance policies (Seguros del Estado S.A., pólizas N° 11-44-101199748 and 11-40-101052152), staff affiliation records, and student attendance lists. However, no formal supervisor acceptance certificate (recibido a satisfacción), delivery record (acta de entrega), or signed supervision approval is visible within this PDF. The document is a contractor-prepared self-report, not a supervisor-signed acceptance.

Payment corresponds to the 4th of 8 monthly payments but document is titled 'Quinto Informe' (5th report) — potential mismatch between report number and payment installment number
Social security payment proofs (August) are referenced as annexes but not visible in this document
Delivery proof (acta de entrega, remisión, or liquidation) not present — delivered_or_received cannot be confirmed as true
claude.reason: This document is a contractor-prepared execution report (Quinto Informe de Ejecución) for Contract CPS-167-2023. It references invoice FEWA-230 for COP $63,439,152 (4th of 8 monthly payments) and describes compliance with all 18 contractual obligations for the August 2023 period. However, the PDF does not contain a supervisor-signed acceptance certificate, a formal delivery record, or the actual invoice — these are referenced as separate annexes. AP should request: (1) the signed supervisor acceptance/certification, (2) the actual electronic invoice FEWA-230, and (3) confirmation of the payment installment number vs. report number discrepancy before approving payment.

claude.evidence_summary: Electronic invoice (Factura Electrónica de Venta) FEWA-182 issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT 823001057-7) to Distrito Especial Turístico y Cultural de Riohacha (NIT 892115007-2) for educational services (administration of partial educational basket at Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11) corresponding to July 2023. Invoice total is COP $63,439,152. The document includes a digital signature (CUFE), QR code, and a declaration of receipt/satisfaction ("Esta factura es un título valor de acuerdo al art. 774 del C.C. y una vez aceptada declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción"). Issued via eFactura / Cadena technology provider. Payment method: bank transfer. Discount: $0. IVA: $0. The invoice references contract No. 187 de 2023 and the FEWA-167 authorization range (valid 2023-11-07 to 2024-11-07).
red_flags: Supplier name on PDF ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA') differs slightly from SECOP record ('DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — likely a typo in SECOP, low risk.
Invoice references internal contract No. 187 de 2023 but SECOP contract reference is CPS-167-2023 / CO1.PCCNTR.4783683 — cross-reference should be verified.
Service period billed is July 2023 but invoice issue date is December 2023 — significant lag of ~5 months between service month and invoicing.
No explicit signed delivery/reception certificate (acta de recibo a satisfacción) attached; acceptance is implied by the electronic invoice acceptance clause only.
File name references 'JUNIO' (June) but invoice description and SECOP row indicate July 2023 service period — month mismatch in file name.
claude.reason: The electronic invoice FEWA-182 is structurally complete with a valid CUFE, digital signature, correct supplier NIT, and invoice total of COP $63,439,152 matching the SECOP record. However, several issues require clarification before approval: (1) the internal contract number (187/2023) does not directly match the SECOP reference (CPS-167-2023), requiring reconciliation; (2) the file name says "JUNIO" but the billed period is July 2023; (3) there is a ~5-month gap between the service period and invoice date; and (4) no standalone signed delivery/supervision acceptance certificate is attached. Request supporting documentation: supervisor's acceptance certificate (acta de supervisión), reconciliation of contract references, and clarification of the June/July discrepancy.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a two-page "Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago" (Payment Processing and Compliance Certificate) issued by the Secretaría de Hacienda of the Distrito Especial de Riohacha. Page 1 shows Contract 167/2023 with supplier ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA. The document records three payments: PRIMER PAGO (FEWA-134, 22-JUN-2023, $211,487,950.80), SEGUNDO PAGO (FEWA-156, 22-SEP-2023, $63,439,152.00), and TERCER PAGO (FEWA-172, 28-NOV-2023, $63,439,152.00). The current payment being processed is invoice FEWA-182 dated 04-DEC-2023 for $63,439,152.00 (SESENTA Y TRES MILLONES CUATROCIENTOS TREINTA Y NUEVE MIL CIENTO CINCUENTA Y DOS PESOS M.L). Page 2 contains the supervisor certification signed on 27-DEC-2023 by JESUS DAVID HERRERA MENDOZA (Secretario de Educación del Distrito de Riohacha, CC 1.140.814.425), certifying that the supplier fulfilled the service to satisfaction per the contract specifications. Document entry number RHC2023ER006902 was filed on 26-DEC-2023. The contract total value is $704,959,836 (after reductions of $20,059,048 from initial $725,018,884). Total executed value is $401,805,406.80 (57.0% execution). Available balance to pay is $303,154,429.20.
red_flags: Invoice number mismatch: payment table lists FEWA-172 as TERCER PAGO (28-NOV-2023) but the current payment section references FEWA-182 dated 04-DEC-2023 — the relationship between these two invoice numbers is unclear and may indicate a re-numbering or correction
File name is 'TRAMITE DE PAGO JUNIO.pdf' but the document corresponds to a December 2023 (TERCER PAGO) payment, not June — filename does not match document content
Paid status is 'no' per SECOP metadata, yet supervisor certification is signed 27-DEC-2023 — payment may be pending disbursement
Total girado (disbursed) is $338,366,254.80 but sum of three listed payments is $338,366,254.80 — consistent, no arithmetic red flag
Supplier name in PDF ('WAYUU ARAURAYU' suffix) slightly differs from SECOP contract supplier name — verify legal name
claude.reason: The supervisor has certified service delivery on 27-DEC-2023 and the compliance certificate is complete with a valid document entry number (RHC2023ER006902). The invoice amount of $63,439,152 is consistent with the second and third payment tranches. However, the invoice number discrepancy (FEWA-172 in the payment table vs. FEWA-182 in the payment information section) and the misleading filename ('TRAMITE DE PAGO JUNIO.pdf' for a December payment) warrant clarification before final approval. Additionally, the SECOP record marks the invoice as unpaid, so confirmation of disbursement status is needed.

claude.evidence_summary: This is Acta Parcial No. 004 (partial delivery/supervision acceptance record) for contract CPS-167-2023, covering the service period 01–31 July 2023. The document is signed by supervisor JESUS DAVID HERRERA MENDOZA (Secretario de Educación de Riohacha) and legal representative RAFAEL ANGEL IGUARAN MONTIEL of the supplier association. The acta confirms: (1) execution period corresponds to 01–31 July 2023; (2) cumulative execution progress is 57.0%; (3) the contractor certified affiliation to social security (health, pension, occupational risk). The value pending to pay to the contractor as of 27 December 2023 is $303,154,429.20. Acta Parcial No 004 value is $63,439,152.00. The document constitutes a signed supervision acceptance act, confirming delivery/receipt of services for this partial period. Invoice number FEWA 182 and invoice total of $63,439,152 are confirmed by SECOP context.
red_flags: Invoice number FEWA 182 does not appear explicitly in the PDF text; it is sourced from the SECOP invoice row context only.
File name references 'JUNIO' (June) but the service period stated in the document is July 2023 (01 al 31 de JULIO del 2023) — possible mislabeling of the file.
Invoice date from SECOP context (2023-12-04) predates the acta signing date visible in the document (27 December 2023), which is inconsistent.
Cumulative value pending to contractor ($303,154,429.20) is large relative to contract value ($704,959,836), suggesting multiple prior unpaid actas — cash-flow risk.
Valor Modificatorio ($704,959,836) equals the stated contract value, suggesting a modificatory addendum exists; original contract value was $725,018,884 — contract modification should be verified.
No explicit 'recibido a satisfacción' stamp visible; acceptance is inferred from supervisor signature on the acta.
claude.reason: The Acta Parcial No. 004 is duly signed by both the buyer's supervisor (Secretario de Educación) and the supplier's legal representative, confirming service delivery for the July 2023 period under contract CPS-167-2023. The partial value of $63,439,152 matches the SECOP invoice row. Social security compliance is certified. The main red flags (file name mislabeling and invoice date discrepancy) are administrative in nature and do not undermine the substantive evidence of delivery. Payment can be approved subject to verification of the file-name/date discrepancy and confirmation that prior actas (001–003) have been properly settled.

claude.evidence_summary: Acta Parcial No 006 signed on 27 November 2024 by supervisor Alberto Mario Cuan (Secretario de Educación, CC 1.118.813.302) and contractor representative Rafael Angel Iguaran Montiel (CC 84.040.046). The supervisor certifies that activities were carried out per Contract CPS-167-2023 for the period 01–30 September 2023, with 75% overall contract execution progress. Social security compliance verified (planillas 9463402911-9463424593). The payable amount for this acta is COP $63,439,152. Cumulative partial actas 001–006 total $529,683,710, leaving $176,276,126 pending. The document constitutes a formal delivery/reception acceptance act signed by both parties.
red_flags: Issue date on the acta is 27 November 2024, but the service period covered is September 2023 — a gap of over 14 months between service delivery and formal acceptance, which is unusual and may indicate delayed processing or backdating.
Invoice date in SECOP system (2023-12-04) does not match the acta signing date (2023-11-27 per document text, but year 2024 per body text) — date inconsistency requires clarification.
Supplier NIT on document (825.001.057-7) should be verified against SECOP registered NIT for CO1.PCCNTR.4783683.
Acta Parcial No 001 value ($211,487,950.80) differs significantly from the uniform value of the other five actas ($63,439,152 each), which may warrant review of the first payment.
No explicit 'recibido a satisfacción' stamp visible; acceptance is inferred from supervisor signature and certification language.
claude.reason: The Acta Parcial No 006 is duly signed by both the contract supervisor (Secretario de Educación) and the contractor's legal representative, certifying that services were rendered per contract CPS-167-2023 for the period 01–30 September 2023. The payable amount of COP $63,439,152 matches the SECOP invoice row total. Social security compliance is confirmed. The main red flag is the large time gap between service period (Sep 2023) and acta signing (Nov 2024), which should be noted but does not by itself block payment given both parties have signed. Recommend approval subject to confirmation of the signing year (2024 vs 2023) and NIT verification.

claude.evidence_summary: Supervisor Alberto Mario Cuan (Secretario de Educación) certifies receipt and verification of the SIXTH progress report (Sexto Informe) from ASOCIACIÓN DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA - WAYUU ARAURAYU (NIT: 825.001.057-7) for contract No. 167-2023, covering the period 01–30 September 2023. The document confirms compliance with the contracted object and authorises the sixth payment of COP $63,439,152, corresponding to 75.0% of the contract value. Certification issued 27 November 2024.
red_flags: Invoice date in SECOP row is 2023-12-04 but the supervision certificate is dated 2024-11-27 — approximately 12-month gap between invoice date and supervisor certification date, which is unusual and warrants clarification.
Supplier name in PDF ('WAYUU ARAURAYU') is a shortened/alternate form of the registered supplier name; NIT 825.001.057-7 should be verified against contract record.

Payment corresponds to 75% of contract value (COP $63,439,152) but contract value in context is COP $704,959,836 — 75% of contract value would be ~$528.7M, not $63.4M; the $63.4M figure appears to be 75% of a sub-period or partial tranche, not 75% of total contract. Discrepancy should be clarified.
No explicit 'recibido a satisfacción' or formal delivery act (acta de entrega) is present; acceptance is implied through supervisor certification only.
claude.reason: The supervision certificate from Alberto Mario Cuan confirms receipt and compliance of the Sixth Report for the September 2023 service period and authorises payment of COP $63,439,152. Delivered_or_received is set to true based on the supervisor's explicit certification. However, three issues require clarification before final approval: (1) the ~12-month gap between the SECOP invoice date (2023-12-04) and the certification date (2024-11-27); (2) the arithmetic inconsistency between the stated 75% of contract value and the actual contract total of COP $704,959,836; and (3) confirmation that the abbreviated supplier name/NIT matches the registered entity. Request supporting documentation to resolve these discrepancies.

line_items.source_text: CÓDIGO 002 | DESCRIPCIÓN: SERVICIO DE EDUCACIÓN, CORRESPONDIENTE AL MES DE JULIO DE 2023, CONTRATO No.187 DE 2023 ... PRECIO U. $63,439,152.00 | CANTIDAD 1.00 | TOTAL $63,439,152.00

claude.evidence_summary: The PDF is a signed electronic invoice (Factura de Venta Electrónica) issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT 823001057-7) to the Distrito Especial Turístico y Cultural de Riohacha (NIT 892115007-2). Invoice FEWA-182 is dated 04/12/2023, for 1 unit of educational service (canasta parcial educativa, Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11) for the month of July 2023, totalling COP $63,439,152.00 with zero IVA and zero discount. The invoice bears a digital signature (CUFE) and a QR code, and includes the statement "Esta factura es un título valor de acuerdo al art. 774 del C.C. y una vez aceptada declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción," which constitutes a receipt/acceptance declaration. Payment method is bank transfer. The invoice references Contrato No. 187 de 2023 internally, while the SECOP context references CPS-167-2023 / CO1.PCCNTR.4783683. The SECOP row lists invoice number FAWA No 267 and total 63,439,152, which matches the invoice total but the invoice number on the PDF (FEWA-182) differs from the SECOP row (FAWA No 267).
red_flags: Invoice number mismatch: PDF shows FEWA-182 but SECOP row references FAWA No 267

Internal contract reference on invoice is 'Contrato No. 187 de 2023', which differs from the known SECOP contract CPS-167-2023 / CO1.PCCNTR.4783683 — possible cross-contract billing or data entry error
Supplier name on PDF ('ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA') differs slightly from SECOP context ('ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — likely typographic but should be verified
No separate physical delivery/reception act (acta de entrega) visible in this single-page PDF; acceptance is implied only by the statutory invoice acceptance clause
Service period billed is July 2023 but invoice is dated December 2023 — significant lag of ~5 months between service month and invoicing date

The document records three payments: PRIMER PAGO (FEWA-134, 22-JUN-2023, $211,487,950.80), SEGUNDO PAGO (FEWA-156, 22-SEP-2023, $63,439,152.00), and TERCER PAGO (FEWA-172, 28-NOV-2023, $63,439,152.00). The current payment being processed is document FEWA-182, dated 04-DIC-2023, for $63,439,152.00 (SESENTA Y TRES MILLONES CUATROCIENTOS TREINTA Y NUEVE MIL CIENTO CINCUENTA Y DOS PESOS M.L). Page 2 contains the supervisor/interventor certification signed on 27-DIC-2023 by JESUS DAVID HERRERA MENDOZA (Secretario de Educación del Distrito de Riohacha), certifying that the supplier fulfilled the service to satisfaction per the contract/order specifications. Document entry number RHC2023ER006902, filed 26-DIC-2023. Contract total value after reductions: $704,959,836.00; total executed: $401,805,406.80 (57.0%); available to pay: $303,154,429.20.

Payment table shows TERCER PAGO linked to FEWA-172 (28-NOV-2023) but current payment document is FEWA-182 (04-DIC-2023) — relationship between these two document numbers should be clarified
No warehouse entry (Número de Entrada de Almacén) recorded on page 2, though this is a service contract so physical warehouse receipt is not expected
Total girado to date ($338,366,254.80) plus current payment ($63,439,152.00) = $401,805,406.80, consistent with Valor Ejecutado — arithmetic checks out

claude.evidence_summary: Acta Parcial No 004 firmada el 27 de diciembre de 2023 por el Supervisor del contrato Jesús David Herrera Mendoza (Secretario de Educación de Riohacha) y el representante legal del contratista Rafael Ángel Iguarán Montiel. El acta certifica la ejecución del servicio correspondiente al periodo del 01 al 31 de julio de 2023, con un avance acumulado del 57%. Se detallan los valores de las actas parciales anteriores (001: $211,487,950.80; 002: $63,439,152.00; 003: $63,439,152.00) y el valor pendiente por pagar al contratista de $303,154,429.20. El valor del contrato es $725,018,884.00 y el valor modificatorio es $704,959,836.00. El acta indica que el contratista ha cumplido con afiliaciones a seguridad social y planillas (9460627564-9460627646).
red_flags: Service period stated as July 2023 (01-31 julio 2023) but the acta is signed on 27 December 2023 — significant delay between service period and acceptance/signing
File name references 'JUNIO' (June) but the body of the document states the execution period is July 2023, creating a month mismatch
Invoice number FAWA No 267 is from SECOP metadata and does not appear explicitly in the PDF body
Pending balance to contractor ($303,154,429.20) is large relative to individual acta value, suggesting multiple unpaid actas
Valor del contrato ($725,018,884) differs from valor modificatorio ($704,959,836) — contract was reduced by modification; ensure correct base is used for payment calculations
claude.reason: The Acta Parcial No 004 is signed by both the supervisor and the contractor's legal representative, confirming delivery and acceptance of services for the July 2023 period at $63,439,152. However, the file name references "JUNIO" while the document body states "JULIO," creating a period mismatch that should be clarified before payment approval. Additionally, the invoice number (FAWA No 267) does not appear explicitly in the PDF. These discrepancies warrant requesting clarification/supporting documentation before approving payment.

claude.evidence_summary: Acta Parcial No 006 signed on 27 November 2024 by supervisor Alberto Mario Cuan (Secretario de Educación, CC 1.118.813.302) and supplier legal representative Rafael Angel Iguaran Montiel (CC 84.040.046). The supervisor certifies that activities were carried out per Contract CPS-167-2023 for the period 01–30 September 2023, with 75% overall contract execution progress. Social security compliance verified (planillas 9463402911-9463424593). The payable amount for this acta is COP $63,439,152. Cumulative partial actas 001–006 total $529,683,710.80 against a modified contract value of $704,959,836, leaving $176,276,126 pending.
red_flags: Acta signed on 27 November 2024 but covers service period September 2023 — over 14-month gap between service delivery and acceptance/signing, which is unusual and may indicate delayed supervision or retroactive approval.
Invoice date in SECOP system is 2023-12-04 but the Acta itself is dated 2024-11-27; date discrepancy between SECOP record and physical document.
Supplier NIT in document (825.001.057-7) should be verified against SECOP registered NIT for ASOCIACIÓN DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU.
Acta Parcial No 001 value ($211,487,950.80) differs significantly from the uniform value of the other five actas ($63,439,152 each), which may warrant review of the breakdown.
No explicit 'recibido a satisfacción' stamp visible; acceptance is inferred from supervisor signature and certification text.
claude.reason: The Acta Parcial No 006 is a properly structured delivery/supervision support document signed by both the buyer's supervisor and the supplier's legal representative. The payable amount of COP $63,439,152 matches the SECOP invoice row (FAWA No 267). The supervisor certifies service execution for September 2023, social security compliance is confirmed, and the cumulative accounting is consistent with the contract value. The main concern is the 14-month delay between service period and acta signing, but this does not block payment on its own. Recommend approval subject to finance team noting the late acceptance and verifying the supplier NIT.

claude.evidence_summary: Electronic invoice FEWA-172 issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT 825001057-7) to the Distrito Especial Turístico y Cultural de Riohacha (NIT 892115007-2) for COP 63,439,152. The invoice covers the third payment for June 2023 under Contract No. 167 de 2023 (CPS-167-2023) for administration of the partial educational basket at Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11, Riohacha. The invoice footer states "Esta factura es un título valor de acuerdo al art. 774 del C.C. y una vez aceptada declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción," which constitutes a receipt-of-service declaration. Issue date 28/11/2023; due date 28/12/2023; payment method: bank debit transfer. No IVA (supplier is non-IVA responsible). CUFE and digital signature present, confirming electronic invoice validity. No discount applied.
red_flags: Supplier name on invoice ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA') differs slightly from SECOP contract supplier name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') – possible data-entry variant, verify NIT match (825001057-7).
Buyer on invoice is 'DISTRITO ESPECIAL TURISTICO Y CULTURAL DE RIOHACHA' whereas SECOP lists buyer as 'ALCALDIA DISTRITO DE RIOHACHA' – confirm these are the same legal entity.
Receipt/delivery evidence is limited to the standard e-invoice acceptance clause; no separate acta de entrega, supervision certificate, or recibido a satisfacción document is included in this PDF.
Service period billed is June 2023 but invoice is dated November 2023 – a ~5-month lag; verify no duplicate payment for the same period.
Payment date field on invoice shows 28/11/2023 (same as issue date), yet SECOP flags invoice as unpaid – confirm actual payment status.

claude.evidence_summary: Acta Parcial No 003 signed on 14 December 2023 by supervisor JESUS DAVID HERRERA MENDOZA (Secretario de Educación de Riohacha) and contractor representative RAFAEL ANGEL IGUARAN MONTIEL. The acta certifies that activities were carried out per contract CPS-167-2023, covering the service period 01–30 June 2023, with 48% cumulative execution. The payable amount for this acta is COP $63,439,152. Social security compliance (planillas 9458771094–9458771304) is confirmed. The document constitutes a formal partial delivery/reception act (acta de recibo parcial) and is signed by both parties, constituting valid delivery proof. The invoice number FEWA 172 is referenced in the SECOP row context but does not appear explicitly in the PDF text itself.
red_flags: Invoice number FEWA 172 does not appear explicitly in the PDF body; it is sourced from the SECOP invoice row metadata only.
Service period covered (June 2023) is significantly earlier than the acta signing date (December 2023), suggesting delayed formalization.
Acta Parcial No 001 value ($211,487,950.80) is disproportionately large compared to Actas 002 and 003 ($63,439,152 each); may warrant review of prior acta.
Valor Pendiente por Pagar al Contratista ($366,593,581.20) is large relative to contract value; confirm remaining obligations are within modified contract scope.
The PDF states the contract initial value as $725,018,884 and the modificatory value as $704,959,836 (a reduction); ensure budget alignment.
claude.reason: The Acta Parcial No 003 is duly signed by both the supervisor (buyer side) and the contractor's legal representative, confirming receipt and acceptance of services for the period 01–30 June 2023. The payable amount of COP $63,439,152 matches the SECOP invoice row total. Social security compliance is certified. Contract reference CPS-167-2023 is consistent. No critical blocking issues are identified; minor flags (invoice number not in PDF body, delayed formalization) do not prevent approval but should be noted.

claude.evidence_summary: This is the Third Execution Report (Tercer Informe de Ejecución) for Contract N°167 de 2023, submitted by Asociación Wayuu Araurayu (NIT 825.001.057-7, represented by Rafael Angel Iguaran Montiel, CC 84.040.046) to the Alcaldía Distrital de Riohacha. The document reports compliance with 13 general obligations including: assumption of contractual responsibilities, SISS social security payments (health, pension, occupational risk) for June, maintenance of guarantee policies (Aseguradora Seguros del Estado S.A., pólizas 11-44-101199748 and 11-40-101052152), participation in supervision committees, and submission of electronic invoice FEWA 172 for the 2nd of 8 monthly payments of $63,439,152 COP. The report references supporting documents (pólizas, social security payment receipts for June, staff affiliation records, student lists) as annexes. However, no explicit supervisor acceptance signature, 'recibido a satisfacción', or formal delivery certificate is visible within the scanned pages provided. The invoice total of $63,439,152 matches the per-payment amount stated in the contract clause (8 monthly payments). Contract total value is $704,959,836 COP.

AP may approve subject to confirmation of the contract number discrepancy.

claude.reason: The electronic invoice is structurally valid (CUFE, digital signature, correct NIT, matching contract reference CPS-167-2023 / Contrato 167 de 2023, and invoice total of COP 63,439,152 consistent with SECOP record). However, payment should not be approved until: (1) a signed supervision/delivery acceptance document (acta de recibo a satisfacción or informe de supervisión) is provided confirming the May 2023 service was rendered; (2) the invoice number discrepancy (FEWA-156 vs FEM156) is reconciled; (3) the issue date discrepancy (2023-09-22 on PDF vs 2023-10-26 in SECOP) is clarified; and (4) the first payment for May 2023 is confirmed to avoid double-billing for the same period.

The document certifies that activities were carried out per Contract CPS-167-2023 for the period 01–31 May 2023, with 39% overall contract execution progress. Social security compliance (planillas 9453854140-9453854194-9453827926) is confirmed. The payable amount for this acta is COP 63,439,152. Cumulative paid to date: Acta 001 (COP 211,487,950.80) + Acta 002 (COP 63,439,152.00) = COP 274,927,102.80; pending balance COP 430,032,773.20 against modified contract value of COP 704,959,836.
red_flags: Service period (May 2023) is significantly earlier than the acta signing date (October 2023) — approximately 5-month lag between execution and formal acceptance

No explicit 'recibido a satisfacción' or delivery receipt language; acceptance is implied by supervisor signature on acta
Acta Parcial No. 001 value (COP 211,487,950.80) is notably large relative to Acta No. 002 (COP 63,439,152) — cumulative 39% progress suggests possible front-loading in Acta 001

claude.reason: The Acta Parcial No. 002 is duly signed by both the entity supervisor and the supplier's legal representative, confirming execution of services for May 2023 under Contract CPS-167-2023. The payable amount of COP 63,439,152 matches the SECOP invoice row total. Social security compliance is certified and planilla numbers are provided. The invoice number FEM156 is not visible in the PDF but is consistent with the SECOP record. No material discrepancies in supplier identity, contract reference, or amounts. Recommend approval subject to confirmation that the 5-month lag between service period and acta signing is administratively normal for this contract type.

claude.evidence_summary: Informe Parcial de Interventoría/Supervisión N° 02 emitido por el Distrito Especial, Turístico y Cultural de Riohacha. El documento certifica el 39.0% de avance en la ejecución del contrato CPS-167-2023 para la administración de la canasta parcial educativa en la Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11. La factura electrónica FEWA-156 por $63.439.152 fue radicada el 22 de septiembre de 2023 (RHC2023ER004894) y subsanada el 28 de septiembre de 2023 (RHC2023ER004991). El informe confirma entrega de soportes: informe de actividades, afiliaciones a seguridad social, matriz de personal, listado de estudiantes, evidencia de dotación, documentos contractuales y matriz de avance económico. El primer pago registrado fue el 06/07/2023 por $211.487.950,80. El valor total del contrato es $704.959.836. Póliza de garantía única No. 11-44-101199748 vigente hasta 31 de diciembre de 2023.
red_flags: La factura FEWA-156 fue subsanada (radicado RHC2023ER004991 del 28/09/2023), lo que indica que la presentación inicial (RHC2023ER004894 del 22/09/2023) tuvo deficiencias que requirieron corrección.
La fecha de factura en SECOP (2023-10-26) no coincide con la fecha indicada en el PDF (22 de septiembre de 2023); posible discrepancia en el registro.
El primer pago registrado ($211.487.950,80) es significativamente mayor que el segundo pago ($63.439.152), lo que es inusual para pagos de igual porcentaje de ejecución (39%); requiere verificación.
El documento es un informe de supervisión, no una factura directa; la factura electrónica FEWA-156 no está adjunta en este PDF para verificación directa de su contenido.
El número de factura en SECOP aparece como FEM156 pero en el PDF se lee FEWA-156; posible error de digitación en el sistema.

claude.evidence_summary: This is the Segundo Informe de Ejecución (Second Execution Report) for Contract N°167-2023, submitted by Asociación Wayuu Araurayu to support the second monthly payment of COP $63,439,152. The report details compliance with 18 general obligations and 18 specific obligations, including: affiliation of all personnel to the social security system (health, pension, occupational risk) for March–April–May 2023; presentation of electronic invoice FEM156; guarantee policies issued by Seguros del Estado S.A. (pólizas N° 11-44-101199748 and 11-40-101052152); SECOP II document uploads; PQRS mechanisms installed; and service delivery at Institución Etnoeducativa N°11 Jarijinamana. The document is a supervision/compliance support report, NOT a signed reception/delivery certificate (acta de recibido a satisfacción). No explicit supervisor sign-off or "recibido a satisfacción" stamp is visible in the scanned pages provided.
red_flags: No signed 'acta de recibido a satisfacción' or supervisor acceptance certificate is visible in the PDF — delivered_or_received cannot be confirmed from this document alone
No supervisor signature or approval stamp found on any page of this informe de ejecución
Document is a self-reported execution report by the contractor (Wayuu Araurayu), not an independent third-party supervision certificate
Invoice FEM156 is referenced but the actual electronic invoice (factura electrónica) is stated to be annexed separately — not included in this PDF
Social security payment receipts for March–May 2023 are referenced as annexed but not visible in the scanned pages
Guarantee policies are referenced as annexed but not visible in the scanned pages
Spelling inconsistency in invoice total written amount: 'CINCCUENTA' instead of 'CINCUENTA' — minor but noted
Page 5 item 14 (obligación 14) appears to be missing from the table — numbering jumps from 13 to 15
claude.reason: The document is a contractor-submitted second execution report (Segundo Informe de Ejecución) for Contract CPS-167-2023, supporting the second monthly payment of COP $63,439,152 (invoice FEM156). The report demonstrates compliance with general and specific contractual obligations, social security payments for March–May 2023, and references the electronic invoice and guarantee policies as annexes. However, the PDF does not contain a signed supervisor acceptance certificate ("recibido a satisfacción" or "informe de supervisión aprobado"), the actual electronic invoice FEM156, or the social security payment receipts — all of which are required per Cláusula Sexta / Parágrafo Sexto before payment can be processed. AP should request the missing supervisor-approved supervision report, the signed electronic invoice FEM156, and the parafiscal/social security payment certificates before approving payment.

claude.evidence_summary: This is Partial Supervision/Interventoría Report No. 01 issued by the Alcaldía Distrital de Riohacha for Convenio/Contrato No. 167 of 2023. The report certifies 30% physical execution progress by supplier ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA - WAYUU ARAURAYU. The supervisor confirms delivery of: (1) activity report, (2) health/pension/parafiscal affiliation proofs, (3) personnel matrix, (4) administrative and teaching staff contracts, (5) student attendance certification, (6) educational materials purchase support, (7) contractual documents, and (8) Economic Advance Matrix for the first payment. Invoice FEWA-134 dated 2023-06-22 for COP $211,487,950.80 is referenced as the billing instrument for the 30% payment. The report was filed under radicado RHC2023ER003026 on 2023-06-16 and corrected under RHC2023ER003186 on 2023-06-27. Financial balance shows: Valor Inicial $726,018,884, Valor Reducciones $20,059,048, Valor Total $704,959,836, Valor Causado no Pagado $211,487,950.80, Valor por Ejecutar $493,471,885.20. No advance (anticipo) was stipulated. Guarantee policy No. 11-44-101199748 and civil liability policy No. 11-40-101052152 confirmed active. SISS payments verified by public accountant HOLVER JOSE VELASQUEZ CC 17.857.059.
red_flags: Invoice FEWA-134 is referenced within the supervision report but the actual invoice document is not directly attached as a standalone page — only referenced in the supervisor narrative
Payment status is 'No' (not yet paid) per SECOP context; no payment order number is recorded in the financial balance table
Financial balance table shows all payment concept rows (Primer Pago through Octavo Pago) as blank/zero except Valor Causado no Pagado, suggesting this is the first and only payment request to date
Supplier name in document ('WAYUU ARAURAYU' suffix) slightly differs from SECOP registered name — verify legal entity match
No explicit 'recibido a satisfacción' stamp or signature block visible in scanned pages; acceptance is implied by supervisor narrative and product delivery checkboxes marked 'Sí'
claude.reason: The Partial Supervision Report No. 01 certifies 30% physical execution of contract CPS-167-2023 and confirms delivery of all required supporting documents. Invoice FEWA-134 for COP $211,487,950.80 is explicitly referenced and matches the 'Valor Causado no Pagado' in the financial balance. All contractual obligations (items 1–11) show 30% advance with product delivery marked 'Sí'. Guarantee policies are active, SISS payments are certified, and the report was duly filed and corrected via official radicados. The invoice total is consistent with 30% of the reduced contract value ($704,959,836 × 30% ≈ $211,487,950.80). No material discrepancies found. Recommended to approve for first payment processing, subject to verification of the standalone electronic invoice FEWA-134 document.

Certifica la recepción y verificación del Séptimo Informe de avances de cumplimiento del contrato CPS-167-2023, correspondiente al período 01-31 de octubre de 2023, equivalente al 84.0% del valor del contrato. Avala el Séptimo Pago por $63.439.152,00 COP. El documento constituye soporte de supervisión/cumplimiento, no una factura.
red_flags: No invoice number present — this is a supervision certification, not an invoice

Payment amount ($63,439,152) is described as 84% of contract value but 84% of the known contract value ($704,959,836) would be approximately $592,166,262 — the stated amount appears to be a partial/installment payment, not 84% of total contract; possible discrepancy or different contract value basis
Service period (Oct 2023) is significantly prior to certification date (Apr 2025) — large time gap between service delivery and supervision certification
Supplier name in document ('WAYUU ARAURAYU') is a trade name suffix not present in the known contract supplier name — minor mismatch, likely same entity
No 'recibido a satisfacción' or formal delivery receipt (acta de entrega) attached; acceptance is implied by supervisor certification only

It is not an invoice and carries no invoice number. The certification supports payment approval, but AP should request the corresponding invoice/cuenta de cobro from the supplier and clarify the arithmetic discrepancy between the stated payment amount and 84% of the known contract value before final approval.

claude.evidence_summary: This is the Seventh Execution Report (Séptimo Informe de Ejecución) for Contract N°167 de 2023, submitted by Asociación Wayuu Araurayu to the Alcaldía Distrito de Riohacha. The document reports compliance with 18 general and specific contractual obligations for the administration of the partial educational basket (canasta parcial educativa) at Institución Etnoeducativa N°11 Jarijinamana in Riohacha, La Guajira. It references the sixth (6th) of 8 monthly payments valued at $63,439,152.00 COP, and states that the corresponding electronic invoice has been attached. Supporting documents mentioned include: insurance policy (pólizas N° 11-44-101199748 and 11-40-101052152 from Seguros del Estado S.A.), social security affiliation and payment records through September 2023, PQRS mechanisms, and SECOP II uploads. The report does NOT itself constitute an invoice, delivery receipt, or supervisor acceptance certificate. No 'recibido a satisfacción', 'acta de entrega', or supervisor sign-off is visible in this document.
red_flags: No invoice number present in this document — invoice is stated to be a separate attachment
No supervisor acceptance signature or 'recibido a satisfacción' visible in this document
The amount $63,439,152.00 COP referenced is the per-payment installment value, not confirmed as an invoice total within this PDF
No delivery receipt or acta de entrega present; document is a self-reported activity report by the contractor
Missing issue date and due date
Payment amount ($63,439,152 x 8 = $507,513,216) does not reconcile with stated contract value of $704,959,836 — possible additional payments or contract modification not explained in this document
claude.reason: This document is a contractor-prepared execution report (informe de actividades/ejecución), not an invoice or supervisor acceptance certificate. It references a separate electronic invoice for the 6th of 8 monthly payments of $63,439,152.00 COP under Contract N°167-2023, but that invoice is not included here. No supervisor sign-off, 'recibido a satisfacción', or acta de entrega is visible. AP should request: (1) the actual electronic invoice referenced, (2) the supervisor's certification/acceptance document, (3) rector/rural director certifications of effective compliance, and (4) the payment processing form (certificado de cumplimiento y trámite de pago) as required by the contract's Paragrafo Sexto before approving payment.

claude.evidence_summary: Informe Parcial de Interventoría/Supervisión No. 05 emitido por la Alcaldía Distrital de Riohacha. El documento certifica el 66% de avance en la ejecución del contrato CPS-167-2023. Se acredita la presentación de la factura electrónica FEWA-230 por $63.439.152 con radicado RHC2024ER001933 del 06/03/2024. Se adjuntan soportes de: (1) informe de actividades, (2) afiliación a salud/pensión/parafiscales, (3) matriz de personal contratado, (4) listado y certificación de estudiantes atendidos, (5) documentos contractuales, (6) matriz avance económico. Pagos de seguridad social verificados (planilla 9463402911-9463424593, certificada por contadora pública Yamairi Estarita Lopezcon C.C. 40.927.490, 23/02/2024). Póliza de garantía única No. 11-44-101199748 vigente. Se registra inicio de proceso sancionatorio por no adecuada ejecución de componentes de canasta parcial y no presentar cuentas de cobro en tiempos establecidos (desde septiembre 2023).
red_flags: Proceso sancionatorio iniciado contra el contratista desde septiembre 2023 por no adecuada ejecución de componentes de la canasta parcial y no presentar cuentas de cobro en los tiempos establecidos
El informe de supervisión No. 05 corresponde al quinto pago pero cubre el período de agosto 2023; existe un desfase temporal significativo entre la ejecución (ago-2023) y la radicación (mar-2024)

La factura electrónica FEWA-230 se referencia en el informe pero no se adjunta como documento independiente; el total de $63.439.152 se extrae del texto narrativo del informe de supervisión, no de la factura directa
El balance financiero (página 2) contiene tablas con valores parcialmente ilegibles por baja resolución del escaneo
Obligación 8 (participación en comités técnicos): Entrega producto marcada como NO (No __X__), indicando incumplimiento parcial
claude.reason: El informe de supervisión No. 05 certifica el 66% de avance y respalda el quinto pago por $63.439.152 (factura FEWA-230, radicado RHC2024ER001933). Sin embargo, se recomienda solicitar soporte adicional antes de aprobar el pago debido a: (1) proceso sancionatorio activo contra el contratista por incumplimientos desde septiembre 2023; (2) la factura electrónica FEWA-230 no está adjunta como documento independiente verificable; (3) una obligación contractual (participación en comités técnicos) marcada como no cumplida; (4) el balance financiero de la página 2 es parcialmente ilegible. Se debe adjuntar la factura electrónica original FEWA-230 y aclarar el estado del proceso sancionatorio antes de proceder al pago.

claude.evidence_summary: Certification issued on 2023-12-27 by José Carlos Rojas Vásquez, Apoyo a la Supervisión, Secretaría de Educación del Distrito de Riohacha. Certifies receipt and verification of the FOURTH progress report (Cuarto Informe) from supplier ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA - WAYUU ARAURAYU (NIT: 825.001.057-7), covering the period July 1–30, 2023, corresponding to 57.0% of contract value. The certified payment amount is COP $63,439,152.00. The document confirms the supplier is complying with the contracted object under contract No. 167-2023.
red_flags: Payment amount of $63,439,152 represents 57% of contract value but contract value context is $704,959,836 — 57% of that would be ~$401,826,906, not $63,439,152; the percentage and amount appear inconsistent with the known contract value, suggesting the 57% may refer to a sub-component or installment base, not the full contract value
Document references an internal service contract number '181-2023' which differs from the known contract reference 'CPS-167-2023'; relationship between these two contract numbers is unclear
No invoice number present — this is a supervision certification, not an invoice
File name references 'JUNIO' (June) but the certified period is July 1–30, 2023 — possible mislabeling of the file
No explicit 'recibido a satisfacción' or formal delivery act (acta de entrega) beyond the supervisor's certification
claude.reason: This document is a valid supervision support certification confirming receipt and verification of the fourth progress report for contract No. 167-2023, covering July 2023. It certifies a payment of COP $63,439,152 (stated as 57% of contract value). However, AP action should be 'request_support' due to: (1) the stated 57% payment amount is mathematically inconsistent with the known total contract value of $704,959,836; (2) a secondary contract reference '181-2023' appears without explanation; and (3) the file name references 'JUNIO' while the certified period is July. These discrepancies require clarification before approving payment.

claude.evidence_summary: Certificación de supervisión emitida el 27 de diciembre de 2023 por el Secretario de Educación Distrital Jesús David Herrera Mendoza, en calidad de supervisor del Contrato No. 167-2023. Certifica la recepción y verificación del CUARTO INFORME de avances de cumplimiento correspondiente al período 01 al 30 de julio de 2023, presentado por ASOCIACIÓN DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA - WAYUU ARAURAYU (NIT: 825.001.057-7). El supervisor constata cumplimiento de la cláusula segunda del contrato y avala el CUARTO pago equivalente al 57.0% del valor del contrato por $63.439.152,00 COP. El documento constituye soporte de supervisión/cumplimiento válido para el pago, pero no es una factura.
red_flags: No invoice number present — this is a supervision certificate, not an invoice

Payment amount of $63,439,152 described as '57.0% del valor del contrato' but 57% of the stated contract value of $704,959,836 ≈ $401,826,906, not $63,439,152 — the percentage and amount appear inconsistent with the total contract value provided in context
File name references 'JUNIO' (June) but the certified service period is July 2023 — possible mislabeling of the file
invoice_total not set as this document does not contain an invoice; the $63,439,152 figure is the supervisor-approved payment amount, not an invoice total
claude.reason: This document is a valid supervision acceptance certificate (soporte de cumplimiento) signed by the designated supervisor, confirming receipt and verification of the fourth progress report for the period July 1–30, 2023, and endorsing a fourth payment of $63,439,152 COP. It supports payment processing but is not itself an invoice. AP should request the corresponding invoice/cuenta de cobro from the supplier before approving disbursement. Additionally, the file name references "JUNIO" while the certified period is July, and the stated payment percentage (57%) does not reconcile with the contract value provided in context — both discrepancies should be clarified before payment is approved.

claude.evidence_summary: Two-page Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago issued by the Secretaría de Hacienda of Alcaldía de Riohacha. Page 1 is the payment certification form for Contract 167/2023 with supplier NIT 825.001.057. It records five prior payments (FEWA-134 through FEWA-230) totalling COP 465,244,558.80 and presents the current invoice FEWA-267 dated 27-Nov-2024 for COP 63,439,152.00 (the sixth/quinto pago listed as FEWA-230 in the payment table but the current document equivalent is FEWA-267). The contract initial value is COP 725,018,884, reduced to COP 704,959,836 after reductions. Execution stands at 75.0%. Page 2 is the supervisor/interventor certification signed on 27-Nov-2024 by Alberto Mario Cuan (Secretario de Educación del Distrito de Riohacha, CC 1.118.813.302), certifying that the supplier fulfilled the service specifications satisfactorily. Document management entry number RHC2024ER00B849 dated 27-Nov-2024 is recorded. Contact person: Jose Carlos Rojas Vasquez, Cobertura - Secretaria de Educacion Distrital.
red_flags: Supplier name in PDF ('WAYUU ARAURAYU') is a slightly extended version of the contract context name; NIT 825.001.057 should be verified against contract record.

Payment table lists 'QUINTO PAGO' as FEWA-230 (01-MAR-2024) but the current invoice document equivalent is FEWA-267 (27-NOV-2024) — possible numbering inconsistency or this is a sixth payment not yet reflected in the table.

Contract vigencia end date shown as 10-DIC-2023 on the form header, yet payments continue into 2024 (FEWA-230 dated 01-MAR-2024 and current FEWA-267 dated 27-NOV-2024) — contract may have been extended but extension is not visible in this document.
Valor Causado No Pagado (field 11) shows COP 63,439,152 and Valor Disponible por Pagar (field 13) shows COP 176,276,126 — gap between executed value and available-to-pay warrants review.
No warehouse/almacén entry number recorded on page 2 (service contract, so expected, but noted).
claude.reason: The supervisor certification on page 2 confirms satisfactory service delivery and the payment certification form is complete with invoice FEWA-267 for COP 63,439,152. However, the invoice sequence numbering discrepancy (FEWA-230 in the payment table vs. FEWA-267 as the current document), the contract end date of 10-DIC-2023 versus payments continuing through November 2024, and the gap in the payment table (only 5 rows recorded but this appears to be a 6th payment) should be clarified with supporting documentation (contract addendum/extension) before final approval.

Certifies receipt and review of the SEXTO INFORME (6th progress report) from ASOCIACIÓN DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA - WAYUU ARAURAYU (NIT 825.001.057-7) covering the period 01–30 September 2023 under Contract No. 167-2023. The supplier is found to be in compliance ("cumplimiento") with the contracted object (clause 2). The certified amount corresponds to 75.0% of the contract value: $63,439,152.00 COP. This figure represents a cumulative contract-execution milestone percentage, NOT a standalone invoice total.
red_flags: No invoice number present — this is a supervision/compliance certificate, not an invoice
The figure $63,439,152.00 COP represents 75% of the contract value (cumulative milestone), not a discrete invoice or accounts-payable total; must not be booked as invoice_total
Certificate issued in November 2024 for a service period ending September 2023 — significant time gap (~14 months) between service period and certification date warrants scrutiny
No 'recibido a satisfacción' or formal delivery receipt (acta de entrega) attached; acceptance is implied by supervision certification only
Supplier name in document ('WAYUU ARAURAYU') is a sub-name/alias; verify NIT 825.001.057-7 matches master vendor record
claude.reason: This document is a valid supervision-support certificate confirming the supplier's compliance with the 6th reporting period (September 2023) of Contract No. 167-2023, representing 75% cumulative contract execution ($63,439,152.00 COP). However, it cannot be used alone to approve a payment: (1) no invoice number is present, (2) the $63,439,152.00 figure is a cumulative milestone percentage of the total contract value, not a discrete payable amount for this period, (3) there is a ~14-month gap between the service period and the certification date, and (4) no standalone invoice or formal delivery receipt (acta de entrega/recibido a satisfacción) is attached. AP should request the corresponding invoice and any prior payment records to determine the net amount actually due for this 6th installment before approving.

claude.evidence_summary: This is the Sixth Execution Report (Sexto Informe de Ejecución) for Contract N°167 de 2023, submitted by Asociación Wayuu Araurayu (NIT 825.001.057-7, represented by Rafael Angel Iguaran Montiel, CC 84.040.046) to the Alcaldía del Distrito Especial Turístico y Cultural de Riohacha. The document covers 18 general and specific contractual obligations and reports compliance status as of September 2023. It references the 5th of 8 monthly payments valued at $63,439,152.00 COP each, and states that the corresponding electronic invoice has been attached. The report confirms: (1) assumption of contractual responsibilities at Institución Etnoeducativa N°11 Jarijinamana; (2) compliance with all obligations due to date; (3) SISS (health, pension, occupational risk) payments current through September; (4) parafiscal contributions current through September; (5) guarantee policy issued by Seguros del Estado S.A. (pólizas N° 11-44-101199748 and 11-40-101052152); (6) SECOP II filings completed; (7) PQRS mechanisms installed; (8) no contractual novelties reported. The document does NOT itself constitute an invoice, delivery receipt, or acceptance certificate — it is a contractor-authored activity/compliance report accompanying the 5th payment request.
red_flags: No invoice number present in this document — invoice is stated to be attached separately
No delivery/receipt acceptance certificate (acta de recibido a satisfacción) visible in this document
invoice_total not set: the figure $63,439,152.00 COP is the per-payment installment amount referenced in the contract clause, not an invoice total stated within this PDF
Document is a contractor self-authored compliance report, not an independent supervisor certification or acta de supervisión
No explicit issue date or period end date stated on the document face
Delivery proof (recibido a satisfacción, acta de entrega) absent from this file
claude.reason: This PDF is a contractor-authored sixth execution report (informe de actividades/cumplimiento) for Contract CPS-167-2023, covering the 5th of 8 monthly payment installments (~$63,439,152 COP each). It documents compliance with 18 contractual obligations through September 2023 and references an attached electronic invoice, but does not itself contain an invoice number, an independent supervisor acceptance certificate, or a formal delivery receipt. AP should request the accompanying electronic invoice, the supervisor's partial certification (informe parcial de supervisión), and the rector/director certifications before approving payment.

Se presenta la factura electrónica FAWA-267 del 27-Nov-2024 por $63.439.152 COP como soporte del sexto pago. El informe incluye: (1) descripción de cumplimiento de obligaciones contractuales, (2) balance financiero con historial de pagos (primer pago $211.487.950, pagos 2-5 de $63.439.162 c/u), (3) soportes de afiliación a salud, pensión y parafiscales del personal contratado (planilla 9471338284-9469843905), (4) listado de personal con cargos e identificaciones, (5) póliza de garantía única No. 11-44-101199748 vigente hasta 31-Dic-2023. Estado de avance físico: 75,0%. El supervisor verificó cumplimiento de obligaciones de seguridad social. Radicado inicial RHC2024ER008152 (30-Oct-2024), subsanado con RHC2024ER008849 (27-Nov-2024).
red_flags: La póliza de garantía registrada tiene vigencia hasta 31 de diciembre de 2023, pero el informe es de noviembre de 2024 — posible vencimiento de garantía sin renovación documentada en este informe
El balance financiero muestra pagos 2-5 con valor $63.439.162 (difiere en $10 del valor de la factura FAWA-267 de $63.439.152 — discrepancia menor pero presente)
El informe es de supervisión/interventoría, no una factura independiente; la factura FAWA-267 no está adjunta como documento separado sino referenciada en el texto

Fecha de terminación del contrato: 10 de diciembre de 2023, pero el informe y la factura son de 2024 — posible ejecución fuera del plazo contractual original sin prórroga documentada en este informe (campo prórroga: N/A para este informe)

El valor del contrato inicial ($725.018.884,00) difiere del valor modificatorio ($704.959.836,00); se usa el valor modificatorio como base
Saldo pendiente por pagar al contratista de $112.836.974,00 sugiere pagos acumulados pendientes que requieren verificación presupuestal

El valor a pagar ($63.439.152,00) es consistente con los valores de las actas parciales previas (002 a 007). Se recomienda aprobar condicionado a verificar la disponibilidad presupuestal para cubrir el saldo pendiente acumulado y confirmar que no existan pagos duplicados para este período.

claude.evidence_summary: The PDF is a valid Colombian electronic invoice (Factura Electrónica de Venta) FEWA-218, issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT 825001057-7) to the Distrito Especial Turístico y Cultural de Riohacha (NIT 892115007-2) on 15/01/2024, due 15/02/2024. It bills COP 65,996,760 for the fifth payment (July 2023) under Contract No. 065 de 2023 for school feeding services at Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11. The invoice carries a valid CUFE and digital signature, and the footer states acceptance implies receipt of goods/services to satisfaction ("declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción"). However, the SECOP row references invoice FEWA-219 with a total of COP 91,543,536, which does not match this PDF (FEWA-218, COP 65,996,760).
red_flags: Invoice number mismatch: SECOP row references FEWA-219 but PDF shows FEWA-218
Invoice total mismatch: SECOP row states COP 91,543,536 but PDF shows COP 65,996,760
Supplier name slight variation: PDF header says 'ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA' vs. contract context 'ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA'
No standalone physical delivery receipt or supervision acceptance document (acta de entrega/recibido a satisfacción) attached; acceptance is implied only by standard invoice footer clause
Payment date listed on invoice (15/02/2024) before invoice due date — may indicate pre-filled or estimated payment date
claude.reason: The PDF invoice (FEWA-218, COP 65,996,760) does not match the SECOP-registered invoice number (FEWA-219) or total (COP 91,543,536). These discrepancies must be resolved before payment can be approved. Additionally, no separate supervision or delivery acceptance document is present in this attachment. The AP team should request the correct invoice PDF matching FEWA-219 and a formal acta de recibo a satisfacción or supervisor's certification before proceeding.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a payment authorization (Autorización de Pagos) dated 09 May 2024, issued by the Financial Professional of the PAE program of the Distrito de Riohacha. It authorizes the FIFTH payment under contract CPS-065-2023 for 17,895 rations effectively delivered during 10–31 July 2023 (15 days of service on average), covering Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11. The total authorized is COP $65,996,760 split across two budget lines (RP 562: $50,149,424 and RP 3078: $15,847,336). The document is signed by Edinson Benites Orcasitas, Prof. Apoyo Financiero PAE. Delivery of rations is certified by the operator. Note: children were on school recess from 01–09 July.
red_flags: Payment authorization total (COP 65,996,760) does not match the SECOP-registered invoice total (COP 91,543,536) — significant discrepancy of ~COP 25,546,776; may indicate partial payment authorization or mismatched document.

Supplier name in PDF ('ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP-registered supplier name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — verify NIT 825001057-7 match.
No formal invoice document (factura) is present in this PDF; this is a payment authorization, not an invoice — the actual invoice/factura should be cross-checked.
Service period (July 2023) is significantly earlier than the payment authorization date (May 2024) and invoice date (January 2024) — delayed processing warrants review.
Children were on school recess 01–09 July 2023; only 15 days of service certified out of a possible ~23 working days — ration count should be validated against attendance records.
No explicit 'recibido a satisfacción' or supervisor acceptance signature visible; delivery is certified by the operator only.

claude.evidence_summary: The document is a two-page "Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago" (payment processing certificate) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Distrito Especial, Turístico y Cultural de Riohacha. Page 1 shows contract CPS-65-2023 with NIT 825001057-7, contract start 16-MAR-2023, end 11-SEP-2023, total contract value $477,566,496, total executed $334,225,000, and lists four invoice rows (FEWA 139 – March, FEWA 150 – April, FEWA 218 – May, FEWA 199 – June) with a total giro of $268,228,240. The current payment being processed is identified at the bottom of page 1 as invoice FEWA 218, expedition date 15-ENE-2023 (likely a document date entry error; service month is July 2023 per page 2). Page 2 confirms the payable amount as $65,996,760 (SESENTA Y CINCO MILLONES NOVECIENTOS NOVENTA Y NUEVE MIL SETECIENTOS SESENTA PESOS), certifies supplier compliance to satisfaction, bears the supervisor's signature (AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO, CC 40.942.612, Secretaría de Educación Distrito de Riohacha), and records document entry number RHC2024ER001989 dated 7-MAR-2024. Delivery/acceptance is confirmed by the supervisor certification on page 2.
red_flags: Invoice number discrepancy: SECOP context references FEWA 219 but the PDF explicitly states FEWA 218 as the invoice being processed
Invoice total discrepancy: SECOP context states invoice total of 91,543,536 COP but the PDF states 65,996,760 COP
Invoice expedition date on PDF reads 15-ENE-2023 but service period is July 2023 – likely a data-entry error on the form

Supplier name on PDF ('ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP registered name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA')
Contract end date on PDF is 11-SEP-2023 but payment was filed in March 2024, suggesting late payment processing
The invoice row labeled MAYO (FEWA 218) in the table on page 1 shows a giro of $90,440,824, yet the payable amount on page 2 is $65,996,760 – internal inconsistency within the PDF itself
% Ejecución shown as 70% while Valor Ejecutado is $334,225,000 out of $477,566,496 – consistent, but available balance ($143,341,496) is less than the claimed payable if FEWA 219 is also pending
claude.reason: Multiple critical discrepancies require resolution before payment can be approved: (1) The invoice number in the PDF (FEWA 218) does not match the SECOP-registered invoice number (FEWA 219). (2) The invoice total in the PDF ($65,996,760) does not match the SECOP-registered total ($91,543,536). (3) There is an internal inconsistency within the PDF itself – the tabular row for FEWA 218 / MAYO shows a giro of $90,440,824 while page 2 states $65,996,760 as the amount to pay. (4) The supplier name differs slightly between the PDF and SECOP. These mismatches must be clarified and corrected before disbursement.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a payment authorization (Autorización de Pagos) dated 18 July 2024, issued by the Financial Professional of the PAE program of the Distrito de Riohacha. It authorizes the SIXTH payment for 24,822 rations effectively delivered during August 1–31, 2023, with 21 certified attendance days, under contract CPS-065-2023. The total authorized payment is COP $91,543,536. The document is signed by Edinson Benites Orcasitas (Prof. Apoyo Financiero PAE). Delivery is confirmed by the phrase "raciones efectivamente entregadas" and the operator's certification of 21 attendance days. Budget line RP 3078, rubro 2.3.2.02.02.009, funded by SGP Asignación Especial – Programa Alimentación Escolar.

No formal delivery certificate (acta de entrega/recibido a satisfacción) attached; delivery is inferred from operator certification language within the payment order itself

However, the document is a payment order rather than a supplier invoice/factura, the supplier name has a minor discrepancy versus the SECOP record, there is an ~11-month lag between service period and authorization, and no standalone delivery certificate is attached. Supporting documents (original factura FEWA 219, acta de entrega/supervisión, and NIT confirmation) should be requested before final approval.
