claude.evidence_summary: Electronic invoice FEWA-218 issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT 825001057-7) to DISTRITO ESPECIAL TURISTICO Y CULTURAL DE RIOHACHA (NIT 892115007-2) on 2024-01-15, for the fifth payment (quinto pago) corresponding to July 2023 under Contract No. 065 de 2023 (CPS-065-2023). Service: school feeding programme (PAE) at Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11, Riohacha, calendar year 2023, per Resolution 18858 de 2018. Invoice total COP 65,996,760 with zero taxes and zero discounts. Payment method: bank debit transfer, scheduled 15/02/2024. The invoice footer states acceptance implies receipt of goods/services to satisfaction ("declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción"), providing implicit delivery confirmation. CUFE and digital signature present, issued via e-Factura / Cadena. SECOP records invoice as unpaid.
red_flags: Supplier name on PDF ('ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA') differs slightly from SECOP contract record ('ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') – likely a typo in SECOP but should be verified

Delivered_or_received is inferred from the standard e-factura acceptance clause ('declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción') rather than a separate signed delivery act or supervision certificate – no standalone acta de entrega or supervisión visible in this PDF
SECOP records payment status as 'no' (unpaid) despite invoice due date of 2024-02-15 – payment should be confirmed
Service period billed is July 2023 but invoice was issued January 2024 – approximately 6-month lag between service period and invoicing
claude.reason: The electronic invoice FEWA-218 is well-formed, references the correct contract (CPS-065-2023 / Contrato 065 de 2023), and the amount (COP 65,996,760) is consistent with a partial payment against the contract value of COP 477,566,496. However, delivery/receipt is only evidenced by the standard e-factura acceptance clause rather than a separate signed supervision or delivery act. Additionally, there is a ~6-month gap between the July 2023 service period and the January 2024 invoice date, and SECOP shows the invoice as unpaid. A standalone supervisión/acta de recibo a satisfacción should be requested before final approval to strengthen the AP evidence chain.

claude.evidence_summary: The document is a two-page "Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago" (payment processing certificate) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Distrito de Riohacha. Page 1 shows the financial balance of contract CPS-065-2023 and lists invoice FEWA 218 (dated 15 Jan 2023 per the PDF footer, but contextually the 5th payment for July 2023) with a giro/payable amount of $65,996,760 COP. Page 2 confirms the invoice base value of $65,996,760, zero IVA, zero advance amortisation, and a net "Valor a Pagar" of $65,996,760 (written out in full in letters). The supervisor AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO (CC 40.942.612, Secretaría de Educación Distrito de Riohacha) has signed the compliance certification, confirming the supplier fulfilled the service to satisfaction. The document entry number RHC2024ER001989 was registered on 7 March 2024 in the Sistema de Gestión Documental, indicating the payment trámite was filed in 2024. Delivered/received is set to true based on the supervisor's signed certification of satisfactory service delivery.
red_flags: Supplier name on PDF ('ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP registered name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') – verify NIT 825001057-7 matches.
Invoice date shown in PDF footer as 15 ENE 2023, but SECOP records invoice date as 2024-01-15 and this is the 5th payment for July 2023 – date discrepancy requires clarification.
No explicit quantity of rations/students billed is stated in the payment certificate; service quantities are not itemised.
Contract total value on PDF ($477,566,496) differs from SECOP context value ($477,566,496) – consistent, but Valor Adiciones ($159,188,832) should be verified against addenda.
Valor Total Girado ($268,228,240) vs. Valor Ejecutado ($334,225,000) gap suggests causado-not-paid amounts; ensure no double payment risk for FEWA 218.
claude.reason: The payment certificate presents a clear and consistent invoice total of $65,996,760 COP for the 5th monthly payment (July 2023) under contract CPS-065-2023. The supervisor has signed the compliance certification confirming satisfactory service delivery. IVA is zero and there is no advance amortisation. The document entry number and filing date are recorded. Minor red flags (supplier name variant, invoice date ambiguity) should be verified but do not block payment. Recommend approval subject to confirming NIT 825001057-7 matches the registered supplier and resolving the invoice date discrepancy.

claude.evidence_summary: Electronic invoice FEWA-219 issued 2024-01-15 by Asociación de Jefes Familiares Wayuu de la Zona Norte de la Alta Guajira (NIT 825001057-7) to Distrito Especial Turístico y Cultural de Riohacha (NIT 892115007-2) for the sixth payment (August 2023) of the school feeding programme at Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11 under Contrato No. 065 de 2023. Invoice total COP 91,543,536 with no taxes or discounts. Due date 2024-02-15; payment method bank debit transfer. The invoice footer states "una vez aceptada declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción", indicating constructive acceptance of delivery. CUFE and digital signature present, issued via e-Factura / Cadena technology provider.
red_flags: Invoice number on PDF (FEWA-219) does not match SECOP row invoice number (EWA-218) — possible sequence mismatch or data-entry error in SECOP system
Invoice total on PDF (COP 91,543,536) does not match SECOP row payable amount (COP 65,996,760) — significant discrepancy requiring clarification
Supplier name on PDF ('ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA') differs slightly from SECOP contract supplier name ('ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — likely typo but should be confirmed
Delivery proof is constructive only (statutory acceptance clause in footer); no separate acta de entrega, supervisión, or recibido a satisfacción document is attached
Payment date listed as 15/02/2024 in 'Fecha de Pago' field, but SECOP row shows invoice as unpaid — status inconsistency
claude.reason: Two critical discrepancies must be resolved before payment: (1) the invoice number on the PDF (FEWA-219) does not match the SECOP-registered invoice number (EWA-218), and (2) the PDF invoice total (COP 91,543,536) is materially higher than the SECOP payable amount (COP 65,996,760) — a difference of COP 25,546,776. Additionally, no independent supervision or delivery acceptance document accompanies this invoice. AP should request clarification on the correct invoice number, reconcile the total discrepancy with the contract supervisor, and obtain a formal acta de recibo a satisfacción before approving payment.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a payment authorization (Autorización de Pagos) dated 18 July 2024, issued by the Financial Professional of the PAE program of the Distrito de Riohacha. It authorizes the SIXTH payment under contract CPS-065-2023 for 24,822 rations effectively delivered during August 1–31, 2023, with 21 average service days certified by the operator. The total authorized payment is $91,543,536 COP. The document is signed by Edinson Benites Orcasitas, Prof. Apoyo Financiero PAE. Delivery is certified within the document itself ("raciones efectivamente entregadas"). However, the payment order total ($91,543,536) does not match the SECOP invoice row total ($65,996,760), which is a significant discrepancy.

SERVICE PERIOD IS AUGUST 2023 but payment order is dated July 2024 — over 11-month lag between service delivery and payment authorization
No standalone delivery certificate (acta de entrega/recibido a satisfacción) is attached; delivery is only self-certified within the payment order text
Invoice date in SECOP (2024-01-15) does not match payment order date (2024-07-18)
claude.reason: The payment order total of $91,543,536 COP materially conflicts with the SECOP-registered invoice total of $65,996,760 COP for invoice EWA-218. This discrepancy of ~$25.5 million COP must be resolved before payment can be approved. Additionally, the supplier name in the PDF does not exactly match the SECOP contract record, and no independent delivery certificate is present. Payment should be blocked pending reconciliation of the invoice amount, supplier identity confirmation, and submission of a formal delivery/reception certificate.

claude.evidence_summary: The document is a signed "Autorización de Pagos" (payment authorization) dated 09 May 2024, issued by the Financial Professional of the PAE program of the Distrito de Riohacha. It authorizes the FIFTH payment for 17,895 rations effectively delivered during 10–31 July 2023 (15 days of service) under contract CPS-065-2023. The total authorized is COP $65,996,760 split across two budget lines (RP 562: $50,149,424 and RP 3078: $15,847,336). The document is signed by Edinson Benites Orcasitas, Prof. Apoyo Financiero PAE. Delivery is certified by the operator. However, the SECOP-registered invoice (FEWA 220) shows a payable of $30,333,800, which does not match the payment authorization total of $65,996,760.
red_flags: Invoice total mismatch: SECOP invoice FEWA 220 records payable of COP 30,333,800 but this payment authorization states COP 65,996,760

Supplier name slight discrepancy: PDF states 'ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU NIT 825001057-7' vs SECOP context 'ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA'
No standalone delivery receipt (acta de entrega / recibido a satisfacción) is present in this document; delivery is only certified by operator statement within the authorization text
Service period (July 2023) is significantly earlier than invoice date (January 2024) and payment authorization date (May 2024), indicating a long delay
Note in document: children were on school recess from 01 to 09 July 2023, reducing effective service days to 15 out of 31
claude.reason: The payment authorization is signed and references confirmed contract CPS-065-2023 with certified delivery of 17,895 rations for July 2023. However, the total authorized (COP 65,996,760) does not match the SECOP-registered invoice amount for FEWA 220 (COP 30,333,800). This discrepancy must be reconciled before approval — it is possible this authorization covers multiple invoices or a different billing period than FEWA 220. Additionally, a formal delivery receipt (acta de entrega or supervisión) should be attached to complete the AP package.

claude.evidence_summary: The document is a two-page "Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago" (payment processing certificate) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Distrito de Riohacha. Page 1 shows the financial balance of contract CPS-065-2023 and lists four invoice rows (FEWA 139 – March, FEWA 150 – April, FEWA 218 – May, FEWA 199 – June) with a total giro of $268,228,240. The active payment being processed on page 2 corresponds to invoice FEWA 218 for $65,996,760 (fifth payment for July 2023). The supervisor AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO (CC 40.942.612, Secretaría de Educación Distrito de Riohacha) signed the compliance certificate on approximately 9 March 2024, certifying that the supplier fulfilled the service to satisfaction. Document entry number RHC2024ER001989 was registered on 7 March 2024. The value in words confirms: "SESENTA Y CINCO MILLONES NOVECIENTOS NOVENTA Y NUEVE MIL SETECIENTOS SESENTA PESOS M/CTE". No IVA applied. Execution percentage shown as 70.0%.
red_flags: Invoice number in PDF (FEWA 218) does not match the SECOP-provided invoice number (FEWA 220) – possible mismatch or wrong attachment
Invoice total in PDF ($65,996,760) does not match SECOP-provided invoice total ($30,333,800) – significant discrepancy requiring clarification

Supplier name in PDF ('ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP supplier name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') – verify NIT 825001057-7
Invoice date shown in PDF header is 15 Jan 2023, but the payment concept is for July 2023 (fifth payment) – date inconsistency
Page 1 table lists FEWA 218 under 'MAYO' (May) with date 9 Oct 2023, yet page 2 states the payment is for July 2023 – internal month inconsistency
No warehouse/almacén receipt section completed (left blank); delivery proof relies solely on supervisor signature
Contract value in PDF ($477,566,496) differs from SECOP contract value ($477,566,496) – matches, but additions of $159,188,832 are noted and should be verified
claude.reason: The compliance certificate is signed by the supervisor and a document entry number exists, indicating service acceptance. However, there are critical discrepancies between the PDF and the SECOP metadata: the invoice number (FEWA 218 vs. FEWA 220), the invoice total ($65,996,760 vs. $30,333,800), and an internal inconsistency in the service month (July vs. May). These mismatches must be resolved before payment can be approved. Additional supporting documentation (original invoice FEWA 220, delivery records) should be requested.

claude.evidence_summary: The PDF is a valid Colombian electronic invoice (Factura Electrónica de Venta) FEWA-219, issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT 825001057-7) to the Distrito Especial Turístico y Cultural de Riohacha (NIT 892115007-2). It bills COP 91,543,536 for the sixth payment (sexto pago) for the School Feeding Programme (PAE) at Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11 for August 2023 under contract CPS-065-2023. The invoice carries a valid CUFE, digital signature, and was issued via e-Factura/Cadena. The document states "una vez aceptada declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción," which constitutes a conditional receipt acknowledgement. However, no separate acta de entrega or supervision acceptance document is present in this single-page PDF.
red_flags: INVOICE NUMBER MISMATCH: PDF shows FEWA-219 but SECOP row references FEWA-220. These may be different invoices or a data-entry error in SECOP.
INVOICE TOTAL MISMATCH: PDF total is COP 91,543,536 but SECOP row records payable amount of COP 30,333,800. Significant discrepancy requires clarification.
SUPPLIER NAME SLIGHT VARIATION: PDF header reads 'ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA' vs. contract context 'ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA' (possible typo in SECOP) – low risk but should be confirmed.

NO STANDALONE DELIVERY/SUPERVISION PROOF: Receipt acknowledgement is embedded in the invoice boilerplate only; no separate acta de recibo a satisfacción or supervisor sign-off is included in this attachment.
PAYMENT DATE STATED AS 15/02/2024 ON INVOICE: Invoice pre-populates a payment date, which is unusual and may indicate the payment has not yet been formally processed.
claude.reason: Two critical discrepancies must be resolved before payment: (1) The invoice number in the PDF (FEWA-219) does not match the SECOP-registered invoice number (FEWA-220), and (2) the invoice total in the PDF (COP 91,543,536) is nearly three times the SECOP-recorded payable amount (COP 30,333,800). It is unclear whether this PDF corresponds to the SECOP row at all, or whether a different/partial payment arrangement applies. Additionally, no independent supervision or delivery acceptance document accompanies this invoice. Payment should be blocked pending: (a) confirmation of the correct invoice number, (b) reconciliation of the billed amount vs. the SECOP-registered amount, and (c) submission of a signed acta de recibo a satisfacción from the contract supervisor.

extractions.excerpt: The PDF is a valid Colombian electronic invoice (Factura Electrónica de Venta) FEWA-219, issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT 825001057-7) to the Distrito Especial Turístico y Cultural de Riohacha (NIT 892115007-2). It bills COP 91,543,536 for the sixth payment (sexto pago) for the School Feeding Programme (PAE) at Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11 for August 2023 under contract CPS-065-2023. The invoice carries a valid CUFE, digital signature, and was issued via e-Factura/Cadena. The document states "una vez aceptada declara haber recibido los bienes y servicios a satisfacción," which constitutes a conditional receipt acknowledgement. However, no separate acta de entrega or supervision acceptance document is present in this single-page PDF.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a payment authorisation (Autorización de Pagos) dated 18 July 2024, issued by the Financial Professional of the PAE programme of the Distrito de Riohacha. It authorises the SIXTH payment for 24,822 rations effectively delivered during August 2023 (21 attendance days certified by the operator) under contract CPS-065-2023. The document certifies delivery of rations ("efectivamente entregadas") and is signed by Edinson Benites Orcasitas, Prof. Apoyo Financiero PAE. The total authorised for August is COP 91,543,536. The SECOP-registered invoice total is COP 30,333,800, which does not match the payment order total of COP 91,543,536 — a significant discrepancy. The supplier name in the PDF ("ASOCIACIÓN FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU") differs slightly from the SECOP-registered name ("ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA").
red_flags: Invoice total in payment order (COP 91,543,536) does not match SECOP-registered invoice total (COP 30,333,800) — difference of COP 61,209,736

Supplier name in PDF ('ASOCIACIÓN FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs from SECOP-registered supplier name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA')
Payment order dated 2024-07-18 authorises payment for service period August 2023 — approximately 11-month lag between service delivery and payment authorisation
This is described as the SIXTH payment but SECOP invoice number FEWA 220 and invoice date 2024-01-15 do not clearly correspond to this specific payment order
No explicit acta de entrega or supervision acceptance document attached; delivery is certified only by the financial professional's statement within this payment order
Unit price per ration not stated in the document, making per-unit verification impossible
claude.reason: The payment order certifies 24,822 rations effectively delivered in August 2023 and is signed by the PAE Financial Professional, providing moderate evidence of service delivery. However, the total authorised (COP 91,543,536) materially differs from the SECOP-registered invoice total (COP 30,333,800), the supplier name does not exactly match the SECOP record, and no separate supervision or delivery acceptance document is attached. These discrepancies must be reconciled — specifically the total mismatch and supplier name — before payment can be approved.

claude.evidence_summary: Electronic invoice FEWA-199 issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT 825001057-7) to the Distrito Especial Turístico y Cultural de Riohacha (NIT 892115007-2) on 2023-12-20, due 2024-01-20. Billed amount is COP 64,945,680 (zero taxes, zero discount) for the fourth payment corresponding to June 2023 school-feeding services at Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11 under contract CPS-065-2023. Payment method is bank debit transfer scheduled for 29/12/2023. The invoice carries a valid CUFE and digital signature. No delivery receipt, supervision acceptance, or acta de entrega is present in this document.
red_flags: No delivery/reception proof in this document (no acta de entrega, no recibido a satisfacción, no supervisor acceptance visible)
Supplier legal name on invoice ('ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA') differs slightly from SECOP contract name ('ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') – minor discrepancy, likely typographic
Service period billed is June 2023 but invoice is dated December 2023 – significant lag between service period and invoicing date
Invoice is marked as unpaid (paid: no) in SECOP despite a stated payment date of 29/12/2023 on the invoice itself
claude.reason: The electronic invoice is well-formed with a valid CUFE, correct contract reference (CPS-065-2023), and a clear billed amount of COP 64,945,680. However, no delivery/reception proof or supervisor acceptance document is attached to this PDF. AP should request the corresponding acta de recibo a satisfacción or supervisor certification before approving payment. The ~6-month lag between the June 2023 service period and the December 2023 invoice date should also be clarified.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a payment authorization (Autorización de Pagos) dated 26 March 2024, issued by the Financial Professional of the PAE program of Distrito de Riohacha. It authorizes the FOURTH payment for 17,610 rations effectively delivered from June 1–23, 2023 (June 24–30 was student recess; operator certified 15 average days of service). Total authorized: $64,945,680 COP. Budget line RP 562, Rubro 2.3.2.02.02.009, funded by SGP Especial Alimentación Escolar. Signed by Edinson Benites Orcasitas, Prof. Apoyo Financiero PAE. No delivery receipt (acta de entrega/recibido a satisfacción) is present in this document.
red_flags: Supplier name in PDF ('ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU / NIT 825001057-7') differs slightly from SECOP registered supplier name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — verify NIT match
No delivery receipt, acta de entrega, or recibido a satisfacción present; delivered_or_received cannot be confirmed from this document alone
Payment authorization dated 2024-03-26 for a service period in June 2023 — significant delay of ~9 months between service and authorization
Invoice date in SECOP (2023-12-20) does not match the authorization date on this PDF (2024-03-26)
Unit price per ration not stated in the document; cannot verify arithmetic independently
claude.reason: The payment authorization amount ($64,945,680 COP) matches the SECOP invoice total and the quantities (17,610 rations for June 1–23, 2023) are clearly stated. However, approval should be withheld pending: (1) confirmation of supplier identity/NIT match given the name discrepancy; (2) provision of a delivery receipt or supervision acceptance document proving the rations were actually received; and (3) clarification of the ~9-month gap between service period and authorization date, and the mismatch between the SECOP invoice date (2023-12-20) and this document's date (2024-03-26).

claude.evidence_summary: The document is a two-page "Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago" (payment processing certificate) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Distrito de Riohacha. Page 1 identifies contract CPS-065-2023, supplier NIT 825001057-7, bank account Banco AV Villas savings account 861074482, and lists four invoice rows (FEWA 139 – March, FEWA 150 – April, FEWA 164 – May, FEWA 199 – June 20 Dec 2023) with a cumulative total giro of $203,282,560. The specific invoice being processed is FEWA 199 (June 2023) for $64,945,680 (Valor a Pagar). Page 2 contains the supervisor/interventor certification signed on 1 April 2024 by AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO (CC 40.942.612, Secretaría de Educación Distrito de Riohacha), confirming the supplier fulfilled the service to satisfaction and all legal requirements for payment are met. Document entry number RHC2024ER001968 was registered on 6 March 2024. The "Valor a Pagar en letras" reads SESENTA Y CUATRO MILLONES NOVECIENTOS CUARENTA Y CINCO MIL SEISCIENTOS OCHENTA PESOS M/CTE ($), confirming $64,945,680. IVA is zero; no advance amortisation applies.
red_flags: Supplier name on document ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP registered name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — likely same entity but warrants verification
Invoice FEWA 199 (June 2023) was issued 2023-12-20 but supervisor certification is dated 2024-04-01, a gap of over 3 months — delayed certification

Three earlier invoices (FEWA 139, 150, 164) appear on the same payment certificate but only FEWA 199 is flagged as the current payment document; it is unclear whether the earlier invoices have already been paid or are also pending
No physical delivery/reception note (acta de entrega or remisión) is present; acceptance is based solely on supervisor certification
claude.reason: The payment certificate includes a signed supervisor certification (AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO, Secretaría de Educación) confirming satisfactory service delivery for June 2023 under contract CPS-065-2023. The invoice amount of $64,945,680 is consistent with the contract scope and execution percentage (84.2%). IVA is zero, no advance to amortise, and the document management entry RHC2024ER001968 confirms formal receipt. Minor red flags (name variant, delayed certification) do not block payment but should be noted. Recommend approval subject to confirming the earlier three invoices (FEWA 139, 150, 164) are already settled and not double-counted in this trámite.

claude.evidence_summary: Acta Parcial No. 004 signed on 1 April 2024 by supervisor AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO (Secretaria de Educación Distrital) and contractor legal representative RAFAEL ANGEL IGUARÁN MONTIEL. The supervisor certifies that activities were carried out per contract CPS-065-2023, covering the service period 1–23 June 2023 (children were on school recess 24–30 June 2023). Contract execution progress is stated at 84.2%. Social security payments for food handlers (manipuladoras) at Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11 are documented with planilla references. The value of this partial act is $64,945,680 COP. Cumulative payments through Acta 004 total $268,228,240 against a contract value of $318,377,664, leaving $268,228,240 pending (note: the document states "valor pendiente por pagar" as $268,228,240, which appears to include Acta 004 itself as unpaid). Page 4 is blank.
red_flags: Supplier name in PDF ('ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP context ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — verify NIT 825001057-7 matches
Contract value in PDF ($318,377,664) differs from SECOP context contract value ($477,566,496) — possible contract amendment or wrong contract reference
Invoice number FEWA 199 from SECOP row does not appear explicitly in the PDF; the document references 'cuenta de cobro No. 004' instead
Invoice date in SECOP row (2023-12-20) does not match the acta signing date (2024-04-01) — date discrepancy requires clarification

'Valor pendiente por pagar al contratista' of $268,228,240 appears to include Acta 004 ($64,945,680) as unpaid, suggesting prior actas 001–003 ($37,772,496 + $75,069,240 + $90,440,824 = $203,282,560) may also be outstanding
Page 4 of the PDF is blank — possible missing supporting documentation
Supervisor notes she was not serving as Secretaria de Educación during the reported period, signing retroactively for procedural purposes
claude.reason: The Acta Parcial No. 004 is signed by both the supervisor and the contractor's legal representative, confirming service delivery for June 2023 at 84.2% contract execution, and the payable amount of $64,945,680 COP matches the SECOP invoice total. However, several discrepancies require clarification before approval: (1) the supplier name and contract value in the PDF do not exactly match the SECOP context data; (2) the invoice number FEWA 199 does not appear in the PDF — only "cuenta de cobro No. 004" is referenced; (3) the SECOP invoice date (2023-12-20) conflicts with the acta date (2024-04-01); and (4) the large outstanding balance suggests prior actas may also be unpaid. These items should be reconciled with the contracting entity before payment is released.

extractions.excerpt: Acta Parcial No. 004 signed on 1 April 2024 by supervisor AMMY MARCELA TORRES QUINTERO (Secretaria de Educación Distrital) and contractor legal representative RAFAEL ANGEL IGUARÁN MONTIEL. claude.evidence_summary: Electronic invoice (Factura Electrónica de Venta) FEWA-164 issued by ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA (NIT 825001057-7) to DISTRITO ESPECIAL TURISTICO Y CULTURAL DE RIOHACHA (NIT 892115007-2) for the third payment for May 2023 school feeding services at Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11 under contract CPS-065-2023. Invoice total is COP 90,440,824 with no IVA. Payment method is bank debit transfer. No delivery receipt, supervision acceptance, or acta de entrega is present in this document. The invoice bears a valid digital signature and CUFE code, and was authorized under electronic invoice range FEWA-112 to FEWA-500.
red_flags: No delivery proof (acta de entrega, recibido a satisfacción, or supervision acceptance) is present in this document — delivered_or_received cannot be confirmed from this PDF alone

Invoice issue date on PDF (09/10/2023) differs from SECOP invoice date (2023-11-25) — date discrepancy requires clarification
Invoice references 'Tercer pago mes de mayo de 2023' but was issued in October 2023 — significant lag between service period and billing date
SECOP records invoice as unpaid (paid: no)
claude.reason: The electronic invoice FEWA-164 is well-formed, references the correct contract (CPS-065-2023), and the total of COP 90,440,824 is clearly stated. However, no delivery proof or supervision acceptance document is included in this PDF, which is required before approving payment. Additionally, there is a date discrepancy between the PDF issue date (09/10/2023) and the SECOP recorded invoice date (2023-11-25), and a minor supplier name mismatch. Supporting documents (acta de recibo a satisfacción, supervisor's certification) should be requested and reconciled before approving payment.

claude.evidence_summary: The document is a formal "Autorización de Pagos" (Payment Authorization) dated 14 November 2023, issued by the Financial Professional of the PAE program of the Distrito de Riohacha. It authorizes the THIRD payment for 24,523 rations effectively delivered during May 1–31, 2023 (21 average service days certified by the operator), under contract CPS-065-2023 with supplier ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU (NIT 825001057-7). The total authorized is $90,440,824 COP charged to RP 562, rubro 2.3.2.02.02.009, SGP Special Assignment source. The document is signed by Oscarina Borrego Flórez (Prof. Apoyo Financiero PAE) and reviewed/approved by Zandra Varela. Delivery is certified as effectively received ("raciones efectivamente entregadas").
red_flags: Supplier name in PDF ('ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP registered name ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — verify NIT 825001057-7 matches
Document is a payment authorization order, not a formal invoice/factura — no standalone invoice document visible in this attachment
Invoice number FEWA-164 is from SECOP metadata and does not appear explicitly in the PDF text
SECOP invoice date (2023-11-25) is 11 days after the payment authorization date (2023-11-14) — minor chronological inconsistency
No formal delivery certificate (acta de entrega/recibido a satisfacción) attached; delivery is certified only by operator's own statement within this authorization letter
claude.reason: The payment authorization is formally signed and approved by the PAE Financial Professional and reviewed by supervision (Zandra Varela). The 24,523 rations for May 2023 are certified as effectively delivered over 21 service days. The total of $90,440,824 COP matches the SECOP invoice record exactly. Budget line (RP 562, rubro 2.3.2.02.02.009, SGP source) is clearly identified. Minor supplier name discrepancy should be verified against NIT, but the NIT 825001057-7 is explicitly stated and can be cross-checked. No blocking issues found; payment can be approved pending NIT verification.

claude.evidence_summary: The document is a two-part "Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago" (Payment Processing and Compliance Certificate) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Distrito de Riohacha. Page 1 shows contract CPS-65-2023 with a total value of $318,377,664, cumulative disbursements of $112,841,736, and lists prior invoices FEWA-139 (March, $37,772,496) and FEWA-150 (April, $75,069,240). Page 3 (page 2 of 2 of the form) records invoice FEWA-164 dated 09-OCT-2023 for $90,440,824 as the third payment for May 2023. The supervisor Nicolás Lubo Matallana (CC 84.083.173, Secretario de Educación Distrito de Riohacha) signed and certified on 14-NOV-2023 that the supplier fulfilled the service to satisfaction. The document entry number RHC2023ER005876 was registered on 14-NOV-2023. IVA is zero (not applicable). Valor a Pagar confirmed in letters: NOVENTA MILLONES CUATROCIENTOS CUARENTA MIL OCHOCIENTOS VEINTICUATRO PESOS M/CTE ($).
red_flags: Supplier name mismatch: SECOP contract lists 'ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA GUAJIRA' but PDF shows 'ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU' (NIT 825001057-7) — likely same entity but name differs
Contract reference inconsistency: page 1 uses 'CPS-65-2023' while page 3 uses 'CSP-065-2023' (transposed letters)
Contract value on PDF ($318,377,664) differs significantly from SECOP contract value ($477,566,496) — possible partial contract or different vigencia tranche
Invoice date on PDF (09-OCT-2023) differs from SECOP invoice date (2023-11-25) — possible registration vs. expedition date discrepancy
Pages 2 and 4 are blank (reverse sides of double-sided print) — no additional supporting documentation visible
No warehouse/almacén entry recorded (Número de Entrada de Almacén is blank) — service contract so this may be expected
Execution percentage shown as 63.8% with $115,095,104 still available to pay — payment appears within available balance
claude.reason: The payment amount ($90,440,824) is supported by a signed supervisor certification dated 14-NOV-2023 and a registered document entry (RHC2023ER005876), and the amount is confirmed in both figures and letters. However, several discrepancies require clarification before final approval: (1) the supplier name on the PDF does not exactly match the SECOP contract record; (2) the contract reference is inconsistently written across pages; (3) the contract value on the PDF ($318,377,664) does not match the SECOP contract value ($477,566,496); and (4) the invoice expedition date on the PDF (09-OCT-2023) differs from the SECOP-recorded invoice date (25-NOV-2023). These mismatches should be reconciled with the contracting area before releasing payment.

claude.evidence_summary: Acta Parcial No 003 signed on 14 November 2023 by supervisor NICOLAS ALBERTO LUBO MATALLANA (Secretario de Educación Distrital) and contractor legal representative RAFAEL ANGEL IGUARAN MONTIEL. The acta certifies that activities were carried out per contract CPS-065-2023 for the period 1–31 May 2023, with 63.8% cumulative execution progress. Social security payments for food handlers at Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11 are documented. The value of this partial acta is $90,440,824 COP. Cumulative paid: Acta 001 ($37,772,496) + Acta 002 ($75,069,240) + Acta 003 ($90,440,824) = $203,282,560; pending balance to contractor: $203,282,560 (against contract value stated in document of $318,377,664, which differs from SECOP context value of $477,566,496).
red_flags: Supplier name mismatch: PDF states 'ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU' (NIT 825001057-7); SECOP context states 'ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA' — different legal name.
Contract value mismatch: PDF states contract value of $318,377,664 COP, but SECOP context provides contract value of $477,566,496 COP — significant discrepancy.
No explicit 'recibido a satisfacción' or formal delivery receipt language; document is a supervision/partial acceptance acta rather than a standalone delivery receipt.
Service period (May 2023) is significantly earlier than acta signing date (November 2023) — approximately 6-month lag between service delivery and formal acceptance.

claude.reason: The Acta Parcial No 003 is signed by both the supervisor and the contractor's legal representative, confirming service execution for May 2023 at 63.8% cumulative progress, and the payable amount of $90,440,824 COP matches the SECOP invoice total. However, payment should be held pending clarification of: (1) the supplier legal name discrepancy between the PDF and SECOP registry, and (2) the significant contract value mismatch ($318,377,664 in PDF vs. $477,566,496 in SECOP), which may indicate an addendum or data entry error that must be reconciled before approval.

extractions.excerpt: Acta Parcial No 003 signed on 14 November 2023 by supervisor NICOLAS ALBERTO LUBO MATALLANA (Secretario de Educación Distrital) and contractor legal representative RAFAEL ANGEL IGUARAN MONTIEL. The acta certifies that activities were carried out per contract CPS-065-2023 for the period 1–31 May 2023, with 63.8% cumulative execution progress. Social security payments for food handlers at Institución Etnoeducativa No. 11 are documented. The value of this partial acta is $90,440,824 COP. Cumulative paid: Acta 001 ($37,772,496) + Acta 002 ($75,069,240) + Acta 003 ($90,440,824) = $203,282,560; pending balance to contractor: $203,282,560 (against contract value stated in document of $318,377,664, which differs from SECOP context value of $477,566,496).

claude.evidence_summary: Acta Parcial No 002 suscrita el 12 de octubre de 2023 entre el Secretario de Educación Distrital (supervisor) Jesús David Herrera Mendoza y el representante legal del contratista Rafael Angel Iguaran Montiel. El acta certifica que las actividades del contrato CPS-065-2023 fueron realizadas según las estipulaciones contractuales, correspondientes al periodo del 1 al 30 de abril de 2023, con un avance del 35.4%. Se adjuntan planillas de seguridad social del personal (coordinador técnico, equipo administrativo y manipuladoras). El valor a pagar del acta es $75.069.240 (tabla) / $75.069.736 (texto en letras). El acta está firmada por ambas partes, constituyendo aceptación de la entrega del servicio.
red_flags: Discrepancia numérica entre el valor en tabla ($75.069.240) y el valor en letras ($75.069.736) dentro del mismo documento — diferencia de $496 pesos.

Nombre del proveedor en el PDF ('ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') difiere ligeramente del nombre registrado en SECOP ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — verificar NIT 825001057-7.
El valor del contrato en el PDF ($318.377.664) no coincide con el valor del contrato en el contexto SECOP ($477.566.496) — posible diferencia de vigencia o adición contractual no reflejada.

La fecha de la factura SECOP (2023-09-05) es anterior a la fecha de suscripción del acta (2023-10-12), lo que puede indicar que la cuenta de cobro fue radicada antes de la firma del acta de supervisión.
No se observa número de cuenta de cobro explícito en el PDF (se menciona 'cuenta de cobro No 002' pero no se adjunta como documento separado visible).
El pago de seguridad social menciona que se canceló sin incluir el sistema de salud para el personal de embalajes y distribución — posible incumplimiento parcial de obligaciones laborales.
claude.reason: El Acta Parcial No 002 está firmada por el supervisor y el representante legal del contratista, lo que constituye evidencia de aceptación del servicio para el periodo de abril 2023. Sin embargo, se recomienda solicitar soporte adicional para: (1) aclarar la discrepancia de $496 entre el valor numérico ($75.069.240) y el valor en letras ($75.069.736) del acta; (2) confirmar la identidad del proveedor dado el nombre ligeramente diferente respecto al registro SECOP; (3) reconciliar el valor del contrato en el PDF vs. el valor SECOP; y (4) verificar el cumplimiento completo de las obligaciones de seguridad social del personal antes de aprobar el pago.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a Certificado de Cumplimiento y Trámite de Pago (compliance and payment processing certificate) issued by the Dirección Financiera of the Distrito de Riohacha. The supervisor JESUS DAVID HERRERA MENDOZA (CC 1.140.814.425), Secretary of Education, signed and certified on 12 October 2023 that the supplier fulfilled the contract/convention to satisfaction and that all legal requirements for payment are met. The document references invoice FEWA 150 (also listed as FEWA 139 in the invoice row table for March concept, dated 6 Jul 2023, value $37,772,496) and the payment order for FEWA 150 dated 5 Sep 2023 for $75,069,240. The document management entry number is RHC2023ER005013, dated 29 Sep 2023. Contract total is $318,377,664 (as stated in this document), with 35.4% execution. Valor Causado No Pagado: $75,069,240. Valor a Pagar in letters: SETENTA Y CINCO MILLONES SESENTA Y NUEVE MIL DOSCIENTOS CUARENTA PESOS M/CTE.
red_flags: Supplier name mismatch: SECOP context lists 'ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA' but PDF shows 'ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU' – likely same entity but names differ

Contract value discrepancy: SECOP context states contract value 477,566,496 COP but this document states Valor Inicial del Contrato as 318,377,664 COP – possible different contract tranche or document error
Invoice concept text references 'calendario escolar vigencia 2022' but contract object and document header reference vigencia 2023 – possible copy-paste error in concept field

Invoice row table on page 1 shows FEWA 139 (March concept, 6 Jul 2023, $37,772,496) while the payment section references FEWA 150 ($75,069,240) – two different invoice numbers present in same document
No explicit acta de entrega or remisión of food rations; delivery acceptance is inferred from supervisor certification only
claude.reason: The supervisor certification (Certificado de Cumplimiento) is present and signed, confirming service delivery acceptance for payment of $75,069,240 COP against contract CPS-065-2023. However, several red flags require clarification before final approval: (1) supplier name discrepancy between SECOP metadata and the PDF; (2) significant contract value discrepancy ($477,566,496 in SECOP vs $318,377,664 in document); (3) the concept text references vigencia 2022 instead of 2023; and (4) two different invoice numbers (FEWA 139 and FEWA 150) appear in the same document. These inconsistencies should be reconciled with the contracting entity before approving payment.

claude.evidence_summary: This is a payment authorization ("Autorización de Pagos") dated 25 July 2023, signed by Oscarina Borrego Florez (Prof. Apoyo Financiero PAE), authorizing the FIRST payment for 10,242 school meal rations (AM/PM complement, prepared on-site) effectively delivered during 21–31 March 2023 under contract CPS-065-2023. The document certifies 9 average service days by the operator and states a total payable of $37,772,496 COP charged to RP 562 / Rubro 2.3.2.02.02.009 / SGP Special Assignment – School Feeding Program. Delivery of rations is explicitly stated as "efectivamente entregadas," constituting delivery confirmation. The SECOP invoice number FEWA 139 is provided in context; the PDF itself does not display it. Supplier name in the PDF slightly differs from the SECOP record but refers to the same NIT 825001057-7 entity.
red_flags: Supplier name in PDF ('ASOCIACION FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA ALTA GUAJIRA WAYUU ARAURAYU') differs slightly from SECOP record ('ASOCIACION DE JEFES FAMILIARES WAYUU DE LA ZONA NORTE DE LA LA GUAJIRA') — verify NIT 825001057-7 matches
Invoice number FEWA 139 not visible in the PDF itself; sourced only from SECOP metadata context
Service period covered (March 21–31, 2023) is significantly earlier than the payment authorization date (July 25, 2023) — ~4-month lag warrants review
Document references 'vigencia 2021-2023' for the program but contract is for 2023 school calendar only — minor inconsistency
No underlying invoice (factura) or formal delivery act (acta de entrega/recibido a satisfacción) is attached; delivery is asserted in the authorization text only
claude.reason: The payment authorization is signed by the authorized PAE Financial Support professional, explicitly certifies 10,242 rations "efectivamente entregadas" during the stated service period, references the correct contract CPS-065-2023, and the total of $37,772,496 COP matches the SECOP invoice record exactly. Red flags are minor (name variant, no separate delivery act attached, invoice number only in metadata) and do not block payment, but the AP team should confirm NIT 825001057-7 matches the contracted supplier and retain the underlying supervision/delivery report as supporting documentation.

It certifies that the operator has complied with the contract's objective for the provision of school feeding services to INSTITUCION ETNOEDUCATIVA NO.11 during the 2023 school year. The document also includes a table detailing the number of beneficiaries, days of attention, and values per institution, and is signed by the Secretary of Education as supervisor. The second page contains a detailed table of the services provided by institution, confirming the total number of rations and the total value paid.

The document also covers the supplier's participation in follow-up committees, the presentation of invoices, and the delivery of food items. The percentage of advance for most items is 84%, with some reaching 100%.

model.evidence_summary: The document is a financial advance matrix for a partial ethnic basket. It details costs for personnel, supplies, and pedagogical expenses. The total contract value is COP 414,660,493. The document indicates that payments for salaries and social security for July, August, and September 2025, as well as service premiums for June 2025, are included. It also mentions payments for a second supply of kits, including an advance payment for a $13,600,000 invoice, and a second training for teachers, as well as potable water supply for June and July. Additionally, it includes fees for the project accountant for July and August 2025, late payment interest on social security forms, and bank charges for the second disbursement. The document appears to be a financial report or statement of account rather than a specific invoice with a number and issue date.

model.evidence_summary: This document is the second progress report for the contract between UNION TEMPORAL AKUMAJASHI and ALCALDÍA DISTRITAL DE RIOHACHA. It details the fulfillment of obligations related to the administration of the educational basket for the ethnic population of Institution Etnoeducativas No. 20. The report includes information on student enrollment and attendance, delivery of school kits, water supply, pedagogical workshops, administrative and pedagogical components, and reporting to the District Secretary of Education. The report indicates that activities were carried out in accordance with the contract and established guidelines, ensuring the continuity of educational services.
